reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities with highly skilled faculty, and bad placements in 2024.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, but it can be better. Our department (DCM & SPH) contains classrooms for different years, a library, and Wi-Fi. The library is provided by the PGI Campus. Water and canteen facilities are also there. The quality of the hostel facilities is average. The quality of food is good, clean, and hygienic. Medical facilities are also provided to the students. The sports management team is also there. On an average, it is good.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the higher officials and facilities for low placements.
reviews.review_text: There are very well developed classrooms and auditoriums for classes and conferences . Practical exposure is very high. The price of mess is very reasonable  . Medical facilities are provided to each and every student . There is special relief in medicines for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Good college review and nice facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is awesome and amazing. There are many facilities given to students, like high-speed Wi-Fi, and the labs are well-updated with all the tools. The library has all the required books. The canteen provides many types of facilities. The sports are well-conducted, both indoors and outdoors.

reviews.review_heading: A really good college with qualified faculty.
reviews.review_text: This university had a well-maintained and developed infrastructure for our course. The college was offering facilities like Wi-Fi, a canteen, labs, a library, sports, etc. We were available for the students. Hostel facilities were available for the students of our college.

reviews.review_heading: Physiotherapy in PGIMER.
reviews.review_text: There are no proper hostel facilities for students. Canteens are good, and food quality is adequate. A sports complex is available for sports activities. As the best medical institute after AIIMS Delhi, it offers a wide range of medical services.

reviews.review_heading: B.Sc. nursing in PGIMER.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is very nice and very cheap. All facilities are provided and the staffs and warden are very cooperative. Good food, light facility and geyser are available.? Security is very strong here. Hostel is also very nearer to college and provides even fridge service.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a different way of leaning.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure consists of world-class equipment for learning and well-air-conditioned classrooms are provided. Department of community medicine and the school of public health provide great facilities to the students.

reviews.review_heading: The best an audiology student can get.
reviews.review_text: Being one of the best hospital in the country, PGIMER definitely has all the modern facilities. They have the best in category machines, labs and equipment. A student gets a chance to work with the latest technology and learn each and everything practically. In addition the quality of food in the doctor's mess is also good.

reviews.review_heading: A review of Post Graduate Institute of Medical Education and Research.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is second to none as we are offered hands-on experience of different concepts. The equipment available is the latest and is updated according to the modern standards and guidelines, which helps us get practical exposure. I am a day scholar, so I don't really know about the food offered in the mess. However, I heard that it's okay.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides free Wi-Fi. It has research labs with advanced equipment. All classrooms have a studious environment. The quality of the food in the canteen is good. It provides a variety of food items.

college_info.college_name: PGIMER Chandigarh

data.description: Hostel is very nice and very cheap. All facilities are provided and the staffs and warden are very cooperative. Good food, light facility and geyser are available. Security is very strong here. Hostel is also very nearer to college and provides even fridge service. Sector 15 is full of pgs also 11 has some. There is hostel in sector 11 for women.

highlights.summary:
King George's Medical University admission 2026 is open. Interested students can apply directly through the official website. A few more updates are given below:

NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, KGMU ranks 8th in Medical, 29th in State Public University and 83rd in the Overall category.

The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for KGMU admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

table.details: King George's Medical University, KGMU Medical College
- 7 in Dental - 8 in Medical - 29 in State Public University - 50 in University - 83 in Overall

college_info.intro:
KGMU popular programmes are BSc, MBBS, and MD. Being a public/government university, the tuition fee for various courses is quite affordable. BSc students can become Military Nurse, Supervisor, Pediatric Nurse, or can take up various job opportunities relevant to their field. MD students can opt from various specialisations available in the university such as Anaesthesia, Biochemistry, ENT, and others. Students opting for the flagship or other programmes can also study ahead from the same university.
Overall, KG Medical University Lucknow is one of the highest-ranked universities present in India with a total seat intake of 338 for the MD course. Students are placed in top companies such as Artisan Aesthetics Group, Apollo Hospitals, Apollo Cradle Hospital, and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by King George's Medical University Lucknow and their respective eligibility and King George's Medical University MBBS fees and other course fees:

faqs.answer: A:    The total fees for BSc courses at KGMU range from INR 48,000 to INR 3 lakh. Fees for the BSc programme also varies according to reservation quota. Candidates from general category are required to pay INR 48,100 (With Hostel) and 43,200 (Without Hostel). However, OBC/ SC/ ST category students are required to pay INR 42100 (With Hostel) and INR 37200 (Without Hostel). Usually, the tuition fee is paid at the beginning of each academic year.
faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for BSc at KGMU?

faqs.answer: A:    The NEET SS application fee is INR 3,500. The fee is same for candidates belonging to each category. This is the application fee for each group. Hence, candidates planning to apply for two groups will have to pay INR 7,000 (3,500 + 3,500). The fee has to be paid in online mode, via credit/debit card or net banking. NBE states, "Applications forms once submitted cannot be withdrawn. Fee shall neither be carried forward to a future date nor refunded under any circumstances. Application once submitted cannot be withdrawn. Any claim for refund, adjustment or carrying forward of Application fee will not be entertained. Examination fees in respect of candidates who are absent or have been declared ineligible due to any reason will be forfeited." As compared to last year, the fee has been reduced. Last year, the fee amount was INR 4,250 for each group.
faqs.question: What is the NEET SS application fee?

faqs.answer: A:    To get admission into KGMU throught UP NEET exam, student must target the rank as per the cutoff list. As per the cutoff, the closing rank for General Home State category stood at 3484. Among the OBC HS category the last round closing rank was 3665. For SC Home State, ST Home State and PWD Home State category candidates also, the cutoff ranks were lenient than 3000. Therefore, it is possible to get admission into KGMU through UP NEET rank of 3000.
faqs.question: Can I get into KGMU with 3000 rank in UP NEET?

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to a three-year MD course at KGMU, there is basic eligibility criteria as per NBE norms. Admissions to this course is based on NEET PG scores. To appear for this entrance exam and admission to MD is offered to those who hold MD degree from a university recognised by Medical Council of India with minimum 55% aggregate in the case of General & OBC categories. There is a relaxation of five percent for SC/ ST category candidates. The reserved category candidates are required to obtain 50% aggregate in the last qualifying exam of MD.

faqs.answer: NEET rank and scores are not required if candidates want to seek admission to the BSc Nursing programme offered at King George's Medical University. The aspirants must appear for the Uttar Pradesh Common Nursing Entrance Test (UP CNET) if they want to get admission to the KGMU BSc Nursing course.
faqs.question: Q: Is NEET required for BSc Nursing in KGMU?

faqs.answer: KGMU Lucknow offers direct admission to only BSc aspirants. For BSc course, the selection is based on the last qualifying exam of Class 12. For other Medical and Dental courses such as MBBS, BDS, MD, DM, etc., candidates are selected based on national-level entrance exams. Admission to these courses is completely based on a valid scores of NEET UG, NEET PG, NEET SS, etc., entrance exams. faqs.answer: KGMU offers admission to MBBS course for a duration to five and half years (66 months). Admission to MBBS courses is entirely entrance-based. In order to get admission to MBBS course at KGMU, candidates must pass Class 12 with minimum 50% aggregate from a recognised board. Form MBBS admissions, KGMU accepts valid scores of NEET UG, which is conducted by National Testing Agency (NTA) every year. Candidates who qualifiy this exam will be allocated seats as per NEET UG Counselling in various rounds.

review_summary.college_name: KGMU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Excellent clinical exposure, supportive faculty, and vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: MBBS courses in government medical colleges in India, including MLNMC Prayagraj, do not offer traditional campus placements like engineering or management institutes. Medical graduates are required to undergo a Compulsory Rotatory Residential Internship for one year. After this, there is a bond of two years to serve as a government doctor in rural hospitals and PHC centres. After this, some graduates take the NEET PG exam and secure a seat in MD/MS courses to pursue post-graduation. Some graduates directly apply as general physicians in private hospital, PHCs, Tutors, and some open their own clinics.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: My dream came true.

content.Placements: The total batch is of 200 students, including both male and female, who are selected through an all-India level examination. It provides both undergraduate and postgraduate degrees in various medical departments, and our college is ranked around 9000.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not so good; it is a very old college. The library facility in our college, which is common to all classrooms, is not so good. It is old, but the teaching is the best. The campus is all green. I think if you love greenery, then it is the best college to attend.

content.Placements: Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Institute of Medical Sciences has good placements. Approximately 100% of students get internships in the same hospital. The average package is reported to be 7.2 LPA, and the highest package is approximately 16 LPA. Overall, every student is placed through the college.
content.Infrastructure: Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Institute of Medical Sciences has good infrastructure for the course and hostel. Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are also best for students. The campus life and hostel life are also good.

individual_reviews.title: This is a good college for admission.

content.Placements: Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Institute of Medical Science has good placement, but it might depend on the student's capabilities and the knowledge of student. Overall, colleges provide good placements, but not all courses. You can check on their website for proper information.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library are all good, and the facilities provided by the college might be different for all courses. I am a day scholar student, so I have no idea about the hostel, but the hostel looks like it gives good facilities for students. There is lunch, and dinner might be good, but not every day.

admission_overview.college_name: KGMU Admission 2026: Dates, Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility, Application Process

admission_overview.title: KGMU Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: King George's Medical University admissions procedure 2026 is now available for different courses. KGMU admissions are merit and entrance-based on the basis of the level and nature of the course one is opting for. King George's Medical University (KGMU) Lucknow, India, is a state government university that was ranked 11th in the NIRF 2024 Rankings. The university has more than 10 courses at different undergraduate (UG), postgraduate (PG), and doctoral levels, in Medicine, Health Sciences, and Nursing streams. The university provides direct admission for BSc programmes; however, admission to other UG and PG courses is based on national entrance exams such as NEET PG, NEET SS, NEET UG, etc.

eligibility_selection.title: KGMU Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: KGMU admission is mostly entrance-based for top UG & PG courses in the field of Medical. Candidates have to meet the basic eligibility requirements of the respective courses to apply for the desired programme. Further, the final seat allotment is done based on UP NEET UG/ PG and NEET SS counselling process. KGMU admission process begins with the applications of various national-level entrance exams. Additionally, there is no limit on the no. of attempts for the NEET UG exam, but the candidate should be at least of 17 years old. A total of 22,09,318 appeared for the NEET 2025 exam, out of which 12,36,531 qualified for the exam. Candidates can visit the official website of the respective exams to apply online. Check below the eligibility criteria, accepting entrance exams and more for the King George's Medical University admissions:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with 50% aggregate in PCB subjects for General category candidates, 45% for PWBD candidates and 40% for SC/ ST candidates & the minimum age should be 17 years
courses_table.selection_criteria: NEET UG + UP NEET UG Counselling

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 in the respective subjects
A UG degree in BDS from a recognised university
A postgraduate degree in (MD/MS/DNB/ Equivalent) from a recognised institution recognised by Medical Council of India or State Medical Council

faqs.answer: KGMU accepts admission to most of the Medical courses through a valid score in NEET (National Eligibility cum Entrance Test). The National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) is the sole entrance test for admission to the BDS and MBBS programmes in India. According to the KGMU (King George's Medical University) cutoff for Round 2 in 2023, the closing ranks for all BDS and MBBS specialisations ranged from 1647 to 26203. For particular rank requirements, please visit the official website of the university. Students who have just started preparing for the next year NEET must prepare according to the NEET paper analysis  and must know about the NEET exam pattern.
faqs.question: What rank is required in NEET for KGMU?

faqs.answer: KGMU UP NEET cutoff 2024 was released in the form of opening and closing cutoff ranks. The cutoff was released for admission to MBBS course, for different categories under Home State quota. For students belonging to the General All India quota, the closing ranks for MBBS was 3484. For OBC Home State category candidates, KGMU MBBS cutoff was 3665. For the SC HS category and ST HS category candidates, the closing ranks were 37757 and 176581, respectively. Finally, for the PWD HS category, the last round closing rank stood at 660143.
faqs.question: How much rank should I score to get KGMU?

faqs.answer: KGMU NEET UG Cutoff 2024 has been out for Round 3. The Cutoff was published for students seeking admission to MBBS/BDS across different categories of candidates under the All India quota. The Round 3 closing ranks for the General quota candidates were closed between the range of 2059 and 29714. Out of all the courses, the most popular one to get admission into was Bachelor of Medicine, Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS).
faqs.question: What is the NEET UG cutoff for MBBS at KGMU?

faqs.answer: KGMU accepts NEET PG scores for the admission to MD and MS specialisations. Recently, KGMU cutoff 2024 Round 2 seat allotment has been released by the institute. As per the cutoff data, the Round 2 ranged between 295 and,  101494 for the General AI category candidates. Among all the courses, the most desirable course among candidates was MD in Radiodiagnosis.
faqs.question: What is the cutoff for admission to KGMU?

paragraphs: King George's Medical University admissions 2026 are based on certain entrance exams for most of the courses. Candidates willing to apply for admission in the university must fill outthe application form online. Find below the step-wise explanation of theKGMU admission process:-
STEP 1: King George's Medical University Application Process

Candidates must go to the official website of the separate entrance tests that are being accepted for their selected courses in order to apply for KGMU admissions for a variety of UG and PG courses. However, the only way to apply for the BSc course is through the official KGMU website (kgmu.org). Before the application deadline, qualified individuals can apply for the tests by completing an application.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
The applicants should be of the required minimum eligibility requirements to be eligible to take the respective entrance exams.
STEP 3: Counselling Process

Merit lists of the top-scoring applicants will be created following the start of the relevant exam. For the final seat allocation, these candidates must register and take part in the course-specific counseling process.
STEP 4: Admission Confirmation
Following seat distribution, chosen students must confirm their enrollment by paying the necessary fees by the KGMU deadline.
KGMU fee structure may include components such asregistration, tuition, examination, and alumni fees.

Coming to affordability, it is one of the reasons why many leave a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships has made education accessible the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Check out theKing George's Medical University feesand package for popular undergraduate & postgraduate courses:
King George’s Medical University Seats 2026

KGMU seat allocation is done through the counselling bodies of the respective courses. There are more than 250 seats available for the MD programme. Seat reservation may be applicable as per the rule of the Government. Check out course-wise seat allocation for the King George's Medical University:
For more information aboutKing George's Medical Universitycheck out the below videos:

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to KGMU Lucknow?
faqs.answer: KGMU Lucknow offers direct admission to only BSc aspirants. For BSc course, the selection is based on the last qualifying exam of Class 12. For other Medical and Dental courses such as MBBS, BDS, MD, DM, etc., candidates are selected based on national-level entrance exams. Admission to these courses is completely based on a valid scores of NEET UG, NEET PG, NEET SS, etc., entrance exams. faqs.question: What is the fee of KGMU?
faqs.answer: Candidates who qualify the selection process for various UG & PG courses at KGMU are offered admission. After the commencement of the counselling process, the selected candidates are required to pay fee for the respective courses to confirm their seats.The total fee may include components such as Tuition Fee, Examination Fee, Security Deposit, Hostel Charges (if applicable), etc. Find below the total fee for a few popular courses offered at KGMU:Popular CoursesTotal Fees*MBBSINR 2.5 lakhMChINR 1.6 Lacs - INR 2.2 lakhDMINR 90,000 - INR 2.2 lakhMDINR 90,000 - INR 1.6 lakhMDSINR 72,000 - 1.6 lakhBScINR 48,000 - 3 lakh*This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: Can I get into KGMU with 3000 rank in UP NEET?
faqs.answer: To get admission into KGMU throught UP NEET exam, student must target the rank as per the cutoff list. As per the cutoff, the closing rank for General Home State category stood at3484. Among the OBC HS category the last round closing rank was3665. For SC Home State, ST Home State and PWD Home State category candidates also, the cutoff ranks were lenient than 3000. Therefore, it is possible to get admission into KGMU through UP NEET rank of 3000.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in KGMU for BSc?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to the BSc Nursing programme offered atKing George's Medical Universitycannot get direct admissionto the programme as the University accepts the rank and scores obtained by candidates in the Uttar Pradesh Common Nursing Entrance Test (UP CNET).

placement_data.title: KGMU Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: A total of 413 students achieved placements during King George Medical College placements 2024. From PG 3-year, 319 students were placed with the median salary reaching INR 16 LPA. There were 52 students who belonged to the BDS program and the median salary was INR 9 LPA. Out of 42 MDS students, 42 were placed, the median package recorded during King George Medical College placements 2024 was INR 16.50 LPA

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for BSc at KGMU?
faqs.answer: The total fees for BSc courses at KGMU range from INR 48,000 to INR 3 lakh . Fees for the BSc programme also varies according to reservation quota. Candidates from general category are required to pay INR 48,100 (With Hostel) and 43,200 (Without Hostel). However, OBC/ SC/ ST category students are required to pay INR 42100 (With Hostel) and INR 37200 (Without Hostel). Usually, the tuition fee is paid at the beginning of each academic year.

faqs.question: What is the NEET SS application fee?
faqs.answer: The NEET SS application fee is INR 3,500. The fee is same for candidates belonging to each category. This is the application fee for each group. Hence, candidates planning to apply for two groups will have to pay INR 7,000 (3,500 + 3,500). The fee has to be paid in online mode, via credit/debit card or net banking. NBE states, "Applications forms once submitted cannot be withdrawn. Fee shall neither be carried forward to a future date nor refunded under any circumstances. Application once submitted cannot be withdrawn. Any claim for refund, adjustment or carrying forward of Application fee will not be entertained. Examination fees in respect of candidates who are absent or have been declared ineligible due to any reason will be forfeited." As compared to last year, the fee has been reduced. Last year, the fee amount was INR 4,250 for each group.

nirf.description:
KGMU has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for KGMU indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, KGMU climbed 5 ranks to #83 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, KGMU climbed 3 ranks to #50 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Medical' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, KGMU climbed 11 ranks to #8 rank in the 'Medical' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Dental' category, the institute's ranks have descended when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, KGMU fell 3 ranks to #7 rank in the 'Dental' category by the NIRF ranking.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Motilal Nehru Medical College, AllahabadReviewed on 1 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent clinical exposure, supportive faculty, and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. There is no Wi-Fi facility. The laboratories are well-equipped for Anatomy, Physiology, Biochemistry, Pathology, Microbiology, and Pharmacology, with modern microscopes, specimens, and simulation models for hands-on learning. There are projectors in class with enough seats. There is a central library that offers all the required books. The hostel provides two individuals in one room. The message quality is good, but a little expensive. There is enough space for g...

reviews.review_heading: My dream came true.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not so good; it is a very old college. The library facility in our college, which is common to all classrooms, is not so good. It is old, but the teaching is the best. The campus is all green. I think if you love greenery, then it is the best college to attend.

reviews.review_heading: Maybe the dream college you want.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good, we have a very good library, and the infrastructure is somewhat old. The campus is very good, with greenery all around. It is very refreshing and is away from the traffic. The hospital is separate. The hostel is a little bit old.  The infrastructure is a little old and not so good...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Institute of Medical Science, LucknowReviewed on 2 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, the institute is good for admission and also value for money. Campus life is also good.
reviews.review_text: Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Institute of Medical Sciences has good infrastructure for the course and hostel. Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are also best for students. The campus life and hostel life are also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Institute of Medical Science, LucknowReviewed on 28 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This is a good college for admission.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library are all good, and the facilities provided by the college might be different for all courses. I am a day scholar student, so I have no idea about the hostel, but the hostel looks like it gives good facilities for students. There is lunch, and dinner might be good, but not every day.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Motilal Nehru Medical College, AllahabadReviewed on 22 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfaction for academic purpose and surroundings. Seniors are very helpful.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the hostel are very good you get a shared room in your early year and then after 3 years, you get a single room. Electricity is always available. Infrastructure is above average. There are multiple mess and each of them serves good hygienic food and a water cooler is also there. Classrooms are well-established and AC furnished. Projectors are placed for visual studies.

reviews.review_heading: King George's Medical University - A medical palace.
reviews.review_text: The campus is astonishing. It is better to say it is a medical palace. Feeling proud to be there. Classrooms, a canteen, and the hostel infrastructure are highly developed compared to any other college. The hostel is good. Mess facilities are provided. The hostel in time is 10 PM. You can enjoy the campus as every place is very beautifully maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Real insight from a Georgian.
reviews.review_text: We had Wi-Fi in both the hostel and campus. Labs and classrooms were very spacious, with classrooms that could accommodate 250 students. The hostel was top-notch, with double-sharing rooms, and every student had a separate almirah and study table. Every room had an attached balcony. The mess was awesome, offering sumptuous meals like dosa, idli, and dahi bade.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Vivekanand College of Nursing, LucknowReviewed on 22 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in terms of knowledge and skill development. It also has good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is pretty good, and if we look externally, our college looks pretty good. The main thing is it has a clean and hygienic environment which our college maintains and makes it pretty attractive. Classrooms are calm with a quiet environment in which students can study quietly with full concentration. Our college has a library with a variety of course books and fictional books.

reviews.review_heading: KGMU College of Nursing, Best Place for Nursing.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there is Wi-Fi available for the students, which they need to register for first at the IT cell of the college. The lecture halls are fully air-conditioned, and there is a fire safety system in each class. We are provided with a health card, with which we can get our health checkups.

reviews.review_heading: A really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college are proper water facilities, projectors, AC classrooms, fire alarms on each and every floor with water sprays attached in every classroom, labs for better understanding of students, and a library where you can find your course books easily. The quality of the hostel is not that good; I would rate it as average. The mess and canteen are good. Events are organized every year, such as Sports Week, where different games like the 400-meter run race and relay rac...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Institute of Medical Science, LucknowReviewed on 18 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Little dissatisfied about not having proper sports facilities but good in academics.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and hostel facilities are great as we got a 3BHK, and 6 students live with a facility of geyser etc. My hostel is in front of the Palassio Mall and Ekana Stadium where we can enjoy the cricket matches just near us (if tickets are having).

reviews.review_heading: Best college for doing nursing as high quality education is provided.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi all over the university. Pediatrics lab, anatomy lab, nursing foundation lab, community health nursing lab. Hostel mess is available. Canteen in the hostel. Health cards for students for free service are available. A ground for sports and games. Excellent campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college is awesome, and education and faculty are exceptional.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is awesome. We have air-conditioned classrooms, advanced labs with instruments, and a library that has lots of books. The hostel is also provided; the fee is 4900 per year. There is a mess to which you have to pay yourself, and there is a study hall provided.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely beautiful and fantastic with good placement.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very good infrastructure, and all the departments are equipped with the best of everything. The classrooms are very spacious and comfortable and equipped with ventilation and good lighting. Sports activities are also done in our college. Hostel facilities also have Wi-Fi and good food.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: JIPMER Pondicherry offers courses in the fields of Medical, Nursing and Allied Health Science. JIPMER imparts UG, PG, and Super Specialty Medical Training through a large hospital complex (JIPMER Hospital) and a Nursing College. Some of the courses available are MBBS, BSc, MSc, MD, MS, MDS, DM, MCh, and PhD courses. The below are the JIPMER Medical College courses and their respective eligibility and fee strcuture:

faqs.answer: A:    The selection criteria vary from one course to another. While some courses like MBBS require valid scores in NEET-UG and other courses like BSc and MSc, the institute conducts its entrance exam. For admission to the flagship MBBS programme, candidates have to appear for the NEET-UG exam. Candidates having valid scores/ rank in NEET-UG can then apply through the JIPMER Puducherry official website followed by the counselling round conducted by the Medical Counselling Committee (MCC), Ministry of Health & Family Welfare.
faqs.question: Can I get into JIPMER Puducherry without NEET?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, the student can get into JIPMER with 75% in 10th and 80% in 12th. JIPMER accepts NEET UG scores for MBBS admission, and doesn't consider 10th and 12th scores if the NEET UG is qualified. However, students need to qualify the eligibility criteria for NEET UG, before filling of the NEET UG examination form. The NEET UG eligibility in respect of 10th and 12th marks is different for different categories of candidates. The Minimum aggregate in the qualifying examination (PCB) is 50 percent for the General category, 45 percent for General PWD and 40 percent for SC/ ST/ OBC/ Reserved-PWD. For more details of the eligible criteria of NEET UG exam, please click here.
faqs.question: Can I get into JIPMER if I have scored just 75% in 10th and 80% in 12th?

faqs.answer: A:    JIPMER Puducherry MBBS fee structure is cumulative of multiple components, such as tuition fee, caution money, and more. The total tuition fee for the UG-level programme is INR 30,465. After the final selection, students need to pay the admission fee amount as per the institute or the first semester fee. The fee amount mentioned here is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

The courses are offered in a well-structured curriculum to make students industry-ready for the future. The offers courses such as B.Sc., MBBS and M.Sc. Candidates can find below the JIPMER fee along with their eligibility criteria:

faqs.answer: The total course fee for the MBBS programme at Jawaharlal Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education & Research (JIPMER), Puducherry is inclusive of admission fee, caution deposit, tuition fee, JIPMER Student Association fee, Learning resource fee, etc. The total tuition fee for the MBBS programme at JIPMER, Puducherry is INR 30.46 K. Candidates can refer to the official website for more details on the same.
faqs.question: Q: What is the fees of MBBS in JIPMER?

faqs.answer: JIPMER MBBS admission is entrance-based followed by MCC counselling. Candidates seeking admission should be Class 12 pass with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Biotechnology with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ST/OBC/OPH candidates). Eligible students further need to appear for the NEET-UG exam conducted by NTA. Furthermore, the candidates need to apply for the JIPMER MBBS course through the official website of the Medical Counseling Committee (MCC) after the declaration of NEET results. Following this, seat allotment is carried out during the counselling. Candidates after final selection have to report at the institute.
faqs.question: Q: What is the procedure to take MBBS admission at JIPMER Puducherry?

faqs.answer: The selection criteria vary from one course to another. While some courses like MBBS require valid scores in NEET-UG and other courses like BSc and MSc, the institute conducts its entrance exam. For admission to the flagship MBBS programme, candidates have to appear for the NEET-UG exam. Candidates having valid scores/ rank in NEET-UG can then apply through the JIPMER Puducherry official website followed by the counselling round conducted by the Medical Counselling Committee (MCC), Ministry of Health & Family Welfare.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get into JIPMER Puducherry without NEET?

faqs.answer: JIPMER application process for all the courses is conducted in online mode only. Candidates applying for JIPMER MBBS admission must fill the NEET UG application form. For other courses offered such as MSc (Nursing), MD, MS, MSc, DM, MCh and PhD candidates are required to submit their application in the prescribed format available online on the official website of JIPMER Puducherry. Below mentioned is the JIPMER Puducherry application process:Register online at the official websiteFill in all the mandatory detailsUpload all the required documents in prescribed formatSubmit the application form

overview_faqs.question: Is JIPMER Puducherry a good institute?
overview_faqs.answer: JIPMER Puducherry is a reputed institution of PG Diploma in the following areas: b.s., m.d., certificate BASLP, MD, DM, M.Ch. FNB (Fellow of National Board), Ph.D., MPH, MS, MDS, MBBS. These programs may be chosen by students to pursue careers in the fields of medicine and health sciences, nursing. The institute's trained and experienced faculty are delivering these programs. According to the student evaluations, JIPMER Pondicherry had a rating of 4.7. Moreover, it was accorded a grade of 4.7 on campus life, 4.1 on placements, 5 on faculty and 4.6 on infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: JIPMER Pondicherry Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MS in General Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Very good campus life, ragging free campus, and lot of exposure apart from books.

content.Placements: From the 6th semester, students were eligible for the placement drives but for my batch the companies began to come in our final year. Companies such as Hexaware, Vivnovation, Argusoft, Surya Technologies, and so on. These were the companies come so far. The packages were between 4 LPA to 7 LPA. According to the college record, 97% of students got placed. If I didn't get placed, I would plan to do the master's.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was very good as it was a central government institute. For books, we had a central library and book bank also. Classrooms were well-equipped with advanced technology. Indoor stadium, basketball, futsal, cricket, etc., were there.

individual_reviews.course: MS in General Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty members and placements.

content.Placements: Around 80-90% of students are placed in this course. The average salary after M.S surgery course often range between Rs. 60,000 and Rs. 1.2 lakhs per month. Roles after MS general surgery include subspecialty training, academic and teaching roles, clinical practice, and many others.
content.Infrastructure: It has well-developed infrastructure and facilities that support medical education, research, and patient care. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are available. We also have a central library, which is large and we also have a modern library with thousands of medical books and journals. Quality of food is good, and the mess and canteen are too well. Food is made with hygiene and is healthy.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Optometry - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: About exceptional optometry course w/practical, camps, and placements.

content.Placements: Above 40% of students scored in NEET, and 50% above plus two is the highest placement. More practical and theory packages are offered in this course. American Council of Optometry and Indian Council of Optometry are top recruiting companies for this course. More than 80% of students will get internships in most health care companies in India. Preliminary examinations of eye, funds examinations, and eye camps are offered in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has Wi-Fi, practical labs, projector based classrooms, seminar rooms, and library facilities (24X7). Single rooms and shared rooms are available in hostels. Mess food is available from different messes with variety of dishes. Medical facilities for students are more concerned. Sports and other activities are more practiced on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Neuro Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best institute with high-level infrastructure and facilities to grow.

content.Placements: 100% of students get paid internships in JIPMER with guidance from top professors in India. Medical colleges don't offer placements, but their internship certificate is base for any job application. Excellence in academics, sports, and arts.
content.Infrastructure: AC and Wi-Fi are available in academic centers 24/7. A central library that has AC and Wi-Fi. Hostel rooms are generally shared by two, with laundry facilities. The fee structure is very minimal, and people are friendly and respectful. There is excellence in academics and facilities.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely the best college for medical education be it any course MBBS or paramedical courses.

content.Placements: Here studies are very nice, both academically and clinical=wise, So when you pass from here, you will learn many clinical skills with which can go and practice in a much better way. Studies are good so people many times clear competitive exams like NEET PG and INI CET with internships.
content.Infrastructure: There is a hostel complex, library, hospital, academic complex, and everything is nice with good maintenance. There is 24/7 Wi-Fi and all other necessities. In the hostel, cleanliness is maintained well. It has facilities like water and 24/7 electricity.

admission_overview.college_name: JIPMER Pondicherry Admission 2025: Dates, Courses, Eligibility, Fees, Application Process

paragraphs: JIPMER admission to all the courses is entrance exam-based. The institute accepts national-level entrance exams such as NEET, INI CET, etc. for admission to specific courses. JIPMER also conducts its very own entrance exams for admission to several courses. All the entrance exams are conducted in theEnglishlanguage only. Admission to allJIPMER(UG, PG, and certificate) is entirely entrance-based. Eligible candidates can register online through the official website of the university.

JIPMER offers various UG, PG, super-speciality, and post-doctoral level programmes in the stream of Medicine and Health Sciences. The courses at JIPMER include BSc, MBBS, MSc, Master of Public Health, MD, MS, Post Graduate Diploma, Post Graduate Fellowship, Post-Baccalaureate Diploma (PBD), PhD, and Post-Doctoral Fellowship (PDF).

For admission toJIPMER courses, candidates must fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria and pass the selection criteria. Applications of only the eligible students are treated as valid. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection details for some of the popularJIPMER courses:
Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate in PCM
Graduation with 55% aggregate
Class 12 with 50% aggregate
NEET + MCC Counselling
Graduation with 55% aggregate
Graduation with 55% aggregate
JIPMER Fee 2025

JIPMER Puducherry fees include multiple components such as tuition fees, hostel fees, admission fees, identity card fees, and caution deposits (refundable). Some of the fee components are one-time payable. Tabulated below is the tuition fees for some of the popular courses of the institute:
*This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The seat allocation at this institute is carried out based on candidates' performance in the selection round and seat availability. Check below theJIPMER Pondicherry seat intakefor some of the programmes:
*This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Find below the step-by-step JIPMER Pondicherry admission process:
1. JIPMER Pondicherry Application Process 2025

Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education & Research accepts applications via online mode. The admission form shall be available in offline mode as well. Candidates must fill in all the details in the application carefully. Also, the application must be submitted on or before the deadline.
2. Release of Merit List

After the conclusion of the application process or before form filling (For some courses), the merit list is released by the institute. The cutoff list indicates the minimum required score in the particular exam for a candidate to become eligible for admission. Aspirants with a score equal to or more than the cutoff marks qualify for the next selection round.
3. Counselling
The merit list candidates further have to participate in the course counselling round. During this process, the institute may verify the candidate's documents and allot seats.
4. Admission Confirmation
After seat allotment, selected students shall pay the required amount of fees to confirm their admission.
For more information about JIPMER Puducherry check out the video below:

courses_data.description: JIPMER Puducherry offers a Bachelor of Science (BSc) programme in Nursing and Allied Medical Sciences. It is a full-time course of four years duration. JIPMER BSc admission is entrance exam-based, conducted on the last Sunday of July every year. The medium of instruction in classes and examinations (all the subjects of study) is English.

faqs.question: What are the essential qualifications for admission to BSc course at JIPMER?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed Class 12 withPhysics, Chemistry, Biology/ Botany & Zoology with a minimum of 50% aggregate along with English as one of the subjects can apply for BSc at JIPMER Puducherry. SC/ST/OBC candidates need 40% aggregate to be eligible, whereas 45% aggregate is required for PwD category candidates) to apply for the course.

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in JIPMER for BSc, if I am not from Pondicherry?
faqs.answer: JIPMER Puducherry admit candidates to its BSc courses on the basis of merit in the NEET exam. Some of the seats are reserved for the students who are residents of Pondicherry. However, the remaining seats are open for admission to candidates across the country. Hence, you can get admission even if you are not from Pondicherry.

cutoff_tables: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery
courses_data.description: JIPMER Pondicherry offer MBBS course of 5.5 years duration. Admission to the programme is based on merit in NEET-UG exam followed by MCC counselling. The maximum period for the completion of the course, excluding the internship period is nine years. The maximum permissible duration for each phase is four years, and four attempts per subject. If a candidate does not complete the course within nine years, his/her name will be removed from the list of students registered under MBBS. To excel in the NEET UG exam, a student must have a proper strategy along with the right approach. Typically, planning for the exam should begin from Class 11. However, here is a last-minute preparation strategy that can be followed. faqs.question: How can I get an MBBS seat at JIPMER Puducherry?
faqs.answer: JIPMER (Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research) offers the Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) programme. faqs.question: How many specialisations does JIPMER Puducherry offer under MD?
faqs.answer: JIPMER Puducherry offers the Doctor of Medicine (MD) programme in 19 specialisations. The PG-level course is offered in a full-time mode. Admission to the courses is based on merit in INI CET. Some of the specialisations in which MD is offered by JIPMER are:General MedicineBiochemistryMicrobiologyPharmacologyPathologyPhysiologyBlood Transfusion and Immuno HematologyDermatologyVenereology & LeprologyPulmonary Medicine, etc.

faqs.question: Can I do final registration without completing basic registration for INI CET 2024?
faqs.answer: No. Candidates will have to complete the basic registration first to proceed for INI CET 2024 final registration. Basic registration comprises providing basic information including personal and contact details and uploading images as per the size and format. The final registration includes filling details in the application form related to academic, internship, registration etc., paying application fees selection of exam choice and taking printout of the application form.

faqs.question: Does INI CET 2025 application process comprise basic and final registration?
faqs.answer: Yes. INI CET 2025 application process comprises both basic and final registration. Candidates who complete the basic registration can proceed for the final registration on the official website, aiimsexams.ac.in. Basic registration includes submitting basic information and uploading images while the final registration includes generation of EUC, providing academic, registration, and internship details in the application form, and paying the application fee. The application form is submitted only

faqs.question: What is the qualification for INI CET?
faqs.answer: A candidate must possess MBBS degree for MD/MS/DM-6yrs/MCH-6yrs and BDS degree for MDS courses of a University recognised by the National Medical Commission/Medical Council of India as notified by Govt. of India and Dental Council of India respectively and must have completed the required period of 12 months compulsory rotating Internship/Practical training in certain period of time. They must have scored the minimum marks in MBBS/BDS or equivalent examination. Minimum marks for candidates belon

faqs.question: How much time is required for INI CET preparation?
faqs.answer: Overall six months time is sufficent for INI CET preparation. This includes 4 month in depth study and 2-month for revision work. The moment a candidate plan to appear for the INI CET, first and formost things he/she should do is to draw a study plan. Focus on those subjects where you are strong in terms of concept. Don't spend too musch time initially on subjects where you are weak. This will demotivate you and affect your preparation. Keep this in mind that concept is key. High yielding topics

faqs.question: What is qualifying INI CET cutoff percentile for the general category?
faqs.answer: Candidates have to score the minimum cut off to qualify for INI CET exam. The qualifying INI CET cut off percentile for the general category is 50%. Candidates who belong to SC/ST/OBC category have to score minimum qualifying cut off, 45. Candidates who qualify the exam with the minimum cut off percentile are eligible for the counselling process. Based on INI CET cut off a merit list will be released. The merit list comprises name of eligible candidates for the different counselling rounds. AIIM

faqs.question: What was the INI CET Nov 2025 result date for the January session?
faqs.answer: AIIMS announced the INI CET result. Result comprising the list of qualified candidates was uploaded on the official website, aiimsexams.ac.in. Those who score the minimum cut off are declared qualified for the exam. Minimum qualifying mark is different for different category.

courses_data.name: JIPMER MDS Admissions 2025
courses_data.description: JIPMER Pondicherry MDS course is offered in Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery and Orthodontics and Dentofacial Orthopaedics. MDS is a three-year course. For admission to MDS at JIPMER, a candidate needs to have a valid score of INI CET.

faqs.question: What is the qualification for INI CET?
faqs.answer: A candidate must possess MBBS degree for MD/MS/DM-6yrs/MCH-6yrs and BDS degree for MDS courses of a University recognised by the National Medical Commission/Medical Council of India as notified by Govt. of India and Dental Council of India respectively and must have completed the required period of 12 months compulsory rotating Internship/Practical training in certain period of time. They must have scored the minimum marks in MBBS/BDS or equivalent examination. Minimum marks for candidates belon

faqs.question: How much time is required for INI CET preparation?
faqs.answer: Overall six months time is sufficent for INI CET preparation. This includes 4 month in depth study and 2-month for revision work. The moment a candidate plan to appear for the INI CET, first and formost things he/she should do is to draw a study plan. Focus on those subjects where you are strong in terms of concept. Don't spend too musch time initially on subjects where you are weak. This will demotivate you and affect your preparation. Keep this in mind that concept is key. High yielding topics

faqs.question: What is qualifying INI CET cutoff percentile for the general category?
faqs.answer: Candidates have to score the minimum cut off to qualify for INI CET exam. The qualifying INI CET cut off percentile for the general category is 50%. Candidates who belong to SC/ST/OBC category have to score minimum qualifying cut off, 45. Candidates who qualify the exam with the minimum cut off percentile are eligible for the counselling process. Based on INI CET cut off a merit list will be released. The merit list comprises name of eligible candidates for the different counselling rounds. AIIM

faqs.question: What was the INI CET Nov 2025 result date for the January session?
faqs.answer: AIIMS announced the INI CET result. Result comprising the list of qualified candidates was uploaded on the official website, aiimsexams.ac.in. Those who score the minimum cut off are declared qualified for the exam. Minimum qualifying mark is different for different category.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in JIPMER for B.Sc with 60% in Class 12th?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/ Botany & Zoology with a minimum of 50% aggregate along with English as one of the subjects can apply for BSc at JIPMER Puducherry.So yes you can apply but you have to crack the entrance test for studying in the JIPMER. If you can crack the entrance test then you can easily apply at the JIPMER.

faqs.question: What is the procedure to take MBBS admission at JIPMER Puducherry?
faqs.answer: JIPMER MBBS admission is entrance-based followed by MCC counselling. Candidates seeking admission should be Class 12 pass with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Biotechnology with a minimum of50% aggregate(45% for SC/ST/OBC/OPH candidates). Eligible students further need to appear for theNEET-UG examconducted by NTA.Furthermore, the candidates need to apply for the JIPMER MBBS course through the official website of the Medical Counseling Committee (MCC) after the declaration of NEET results. Following this, seat allotment is carried out during the counselling. Candidates after final selection have to report at the institute.

faqs.question: Can I get into JIPMER Puducherry without NEET?
faqs.answer: The selection criteria vary from one course to another. While some courses like MBBS require valid scores in NEET-UG and other courses like BSc and MSc, the institute conducts its entrance exam. For admission to the flagship MBBS programme, candidates have to appear for the NEET-UG exam. Candidates having valid scores/ rank in NEET-UG can then apply through the JIPMER Puducherry official website followed by the counselling round conducted by the Medical Counselling Committee (MCC), Ministry of Health & Family Welfare.

faqs.question: Can I get into JIPMER if I have scored just 75% in 10th and 80% in 12th?
faqs.answer: Yes, the student can get into JIPMER with 75% in 10th and 80% in 12th.JIPMERaccepts NEET UG scores for MBBS admission, and doesn't consider 10th and 12th scores if the NEET UG is qualified. However, students need to qualify the eligibility criteria for NEET UG, before filling of the NEET UG examination form. The NEET UG eligibility in respect of 10th and 12th marks is different for different categories of candidates. The Minimum aggregate in the qualifying examination (PCB) is 50 percent for the General category, 45 percent for General PWD and 40 percent for SC/ ST/ OBC/ Reserved-PWD. For more details of the eligible criteria of NEET UG exam, please clickhere.

faqs.question: What is the scope of job after BSc?
faqs.answer: With BSc degree you are eligible for majority of non technical posts in Government (Central, State, PSU, Banks etc) where eligibility criterion is graduation degree. Beside this you may able to get job of technician, lab assistant in Scientific R&D organisation. You are also eligible to do BEd and take school teacher job. In order to have better career growth you will have to do post graduation.

description: JIPMER cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

JIPMER NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 260 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

JIPMER MBBS cutoff 2025 was 260 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 748 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

JIPMER accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.
JIPMER INI CET cutoff 2026 has been released for the postgraduate courses MD, MS, M.Ch., etc. At Round 3, the closing ranks ranged from 59 to 11018 for students in the General AI quota.

Considering the ranks, the most competitive for admission was MD in Radio Diagnosis, with a lowest cutoff rank of 59. On the otherhand, the least competitive was MD in Physiology, with INI CET 2026 cutoff rank of for admission in the General category.

In the table below, candidates can find the INI CET round- and category-wise cut-off details for admission to various PG medical courses. For General AI category students, the top three most competitive courses for admission were MD in Radio Diagnosis, MD in Pediatrics and M.Ch. in Neuro Surgery, with Round 3 closing ranks of 59, 182 and 381, respectively.

INI CET counselling is conducted in four rounds: mock round, first round, second round, and open round. All the rounds of counselling are conducted online. highlights.description: JIPMER has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #43 in the Overall category, and #4 under Medical by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around JIPMER rankings:

rankings.highlight: Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Pondicherry In 2025

nirf.description:
JIPMER has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for JIPMER indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, JIPMER fell 4 ranks to #43 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Medical', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, JIPMER climbed 1 rank to #4 rank in the 'Medical' category by the NIRF ranking.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Autonomic Function Testing Laboratory, Pulmonary Function Test Laboratory, Electrophysiology Laboratory

reviews.review_heading: Very good campus life, ragging free campus, and lot of exposure apart from books.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was very good as it was a central government institute. For books, we had a central library and book bank also. Classrooms were well-equipped with advanced technology. Indoor stadium, basketball, futsal, cricket, etc., were there.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: It has well-developed infrastructure and facilities that support medical education, research, and patient care. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are available. We also have a central library, which is large and we also have a modern library with thousands of medical books and journals. Quality of food is good, and the mess and canteen are too well. Food is made with hygiene and is healthy.

reviews.review_heading: About exceptional optometry course w/practical, camps, and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi, practical labs, projector based classrooms, seminar rooms, and library facilities (24X7). Single rooms and shared rooms are available in hostels. Mess food is available from different messes with variety of dishes. Medical facilities for students are more concerned. Sports and other activities are more practiced on campus.

reviews.review_heading: The best institute with high-level infrastructure and facilities to grow.
reviews.review_text: AC and Wi-Fi are available in academic centers 24/7. A central library that has AC and Wi-Fi. Hostel rooms are generally shared by two, with laundry facilities. The fee structure is very minimal, and people are friendly and respectful. There is excellence in academics and facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely the best college for medical education be it any course MBBS or paramedical courses.
reviews.review_text: There is a hostel complex, library, hospital, academic complex, and everything is nice with good maintenance. There is 24/7 Wi-Fi and all other necessities. In the hostel, cleanliness is maintained well. It has facilities like water and 24/7 electricity.

reviews.review_heading: Security service has to be more strict.
reviews.review_text: The overall facilities and infrastructure available for our department were good. The security arrangements were not so tight. Anyone could enter the college. Classrooms and labs were in good condition. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen was hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research.
reviews.review_text: Most amazing and relaxing environment, so students from various areas prefer to do their college at JIPMER, Puducherry. It is compulsory to wear white coats and carry stethoscopes daily. A separate canteen is available for the students and for the hospital visitors.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty members. Good infrastructure and library.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are air-conditioned and well-maintained with advanced smart classrooms and wi-fi is available. Library contains good resources and books, library has a good calm condition for studying and a good collection of books and is research-friendly.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by JIPMER Karaikal - Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and ResearchReviewed on 8 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: "Best university through NEET UG, offering the best study exposure, clinical knowledge, and faculty
reviews.review_text: We have smart classrooms with AC, 5G Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, more than enough microscopes, machines, facilities, etc. The library is equipped with all standard and regional books from all authors. E-library facility is also there. There are cricket and football grounds, a TT hall, and a badminton court.

reviews.review_heading: Memories in JIPMER campus.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are air-conditioned with enough space. Lectures are taken by faculty members and are of very good quality. There is JIPMER Wi-Fi available for students' use. Our hostel, Nightingale, is near the College of Nursing. In the hostel, three persons are accommodated in one room. If you want a single room, you can get it in the third year. JIPMER also has facilities for futsal, basketball, and throwball.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and the library are available 24 hours. All types of messes are available. There are wide-spaced, full, and well-ventilated classrooms; some of them have AC also. You will have any medical facility once you are a student; you have consideration also. Different types of sports and courts are available here.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college to study paramedics and MBBS.
reviews.review_text: In hostels, it is very clean, and there are maids for cleaning the rooms and doing laundry. Also, we can cook in the pantry room, and they also provide kettles for making hot water or tea. There are heaters in bathrooms, and hostels are very clean, and a 24-hour security system is there.

reviews.review_heading: Best place for those who want to be a great doctor.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, and all labs have advanced classrooms that can accommodate 200+ students. The library works 24/7 with air conditioning. Food is average and not very good. Single and double room hostels are available, and there are many cultural programs and games, including indoor and outdoor activities. JIPMER Wi-Fi is available almost all over the campus.

reviews.review_heading: My campus through my eyes.
reviews.review_text: JIPMER provides free Wi-Fi for students everywhere in the campus. The vast and spacious library is open for students for 24 hours and it is so special. It contains a lot of medical books and journals and JIPMER has a lot of sports items.

reviews.review_heading: Jipmer College is very good; they provide all facilities to students, like Wi-Fi, library, lab, etc.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good at our college. They provided Wi-Fi to students. Two labs are there. In the lab, all facilities are provided. In hostels, they provide every possible facility. Near the college, two messes are present. Mess food is good but I miss home food.

college_info.intro:
BITS Pilani Jhunjhunu comprises of 13 departments including Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Pharmacy, Management, Science, etc. The departments of the institute offers a wide range of UG, PG, diploma, certificate and PhD programmes across various streams. BTech/ BE, MTech and MBA are the popular programmes offered at the institute.
BITS Pilani offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The institute offers BTech/BE specilisation in Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering and others. The MBA programme offered by the BITS Pilani is a two year programme. It is offered in several specilisations, including Finance, Business Analytics, FinTech, Quality Management, and others. overview_faqs.question: Why is the BTech fee so high at BITS Pilani?
overview_faqs.answer: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani is accredited by the NAAC with an ‘A’ Grade and approved by the UGC. Internationally, Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani is ranked 801-850 by the QS World University Rankings 2025 under the 'World University' category. The deemed university is ranked 20 and 25 under the 'University' and 'Engineering' by the NIRF 2023 Rankings. The BTech fees at BITS Pilani is usually high in comparison to other universities because of several reasons. Some of the reasons include strong reputation, highly qualified facilities who are expertise in their own field, promoting research and development in various fields and excellent infrastructure which includes state-of-the-art labs, libraries, sports facilities, and accommodation facilities. Many students get attracted to pursue BTech at BITS Pilani irrespective of higher fees due to the strong and top quality education provided by the university which help the graduates to placed in top comp

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee refund policy at BITS Pilani?
overview_faqs.answer: In BITS Pilani, fees once paid will not be refunded once the payment is done. In duplicate clause if the payments paid twice the amount will be paid within 30-40 working days. Additionally, convenience fee & taxes charged would not be refunded/ reversed for any refund or reversal of any transaction.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees of BPharm at BITS Pilani?
overview_faqs.answer: The total course fee is inclusive of multiple components, such as hostel fee, tuition fee, security deposit, and more. Some of these charges are one-time chargeable, while some are charged annually/semesterly. BITS Pilani BPham tuition fee is INR 19.94 lakh. The fee is, exclusive of the summer term fee worth INR 82,600 for registered candidates only. The mentioned fee amount is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. For detailed BITS Pilani BPharm fee structure, candidates are advised to contact the admission department of the institute.

faqs.answer: BITSAT preparation tips can be checked by candidates to prepare for upcoming entrance examination. With lakhs of students appearing for BITSAT, it is important for candidates to have an effective preparation strategy for the exam to score good marks in it. Usually, a majority of engineering aspirants prepare for BITSAT and JEE Main simultaneously. Both the exams follow the same syllabus but have a different question paper pattern and so do the marking schemes. The major difference between the two exams is the approach to creating questions. JEE Main focuses on conceptual learning and BITSAT is more about speed and accuracy. Kindly visit the link. https://www.shiksha.com/engineering/bitsat-exam-preparation.

paragraphs: Admission in BITS for all the first degree, higher degree, MBA, and doctoral programs are governed by the performance of a candidate in program-specific entrance tests. The candidates who are interested in availing admission may submit applications online through various program-specific application portals.BTITS Pilani admission process is in various steps such as application, visiting the selection rounds, offline admission step, and document verification.The BITS Pilani admission process that students have to go through in stages is as follows:1. BITS Pilani Application Process 2026BITS Pilani provides an online application procedure for all programs. The candidates can complete the BITS Pilani application form 2026 on the official website for the desired programs. The registration fee for every program is different.2. BITS Pilani Selection Process 2026As per BITS Pilani admission procedure, the applicants for a specific course at BITS Pilani, are required to take the corresponding entrance exam.3. Publication of Merit Lists in BITS Pilani 2026Selection result is published as a merit list on the official website. Shortlisted applicants need to appear in WAT-PI rounds.4. Document Verification & Admission Fee Payment in BITS Pilani 2026Shortlisted candidates hereunder should pay the stipulated admission charge for the specific course. Subsequently, document verification is conducted and the schedule of start of classes is communicated.

faqs.question: What is the BITSAT application fee?
faqs.answer: While filling out the BITSAT application form, the candidates will have to pay the required fee. For a single session, the BITSAT application fee is INR 3,400 (male candidates) and INR 2,900 (female candidates). However, if the candidates wish to attempt both sessions, then they will have to pay INR 5,400 (male candidates) and INR 4,400 (female candidates). The application fee can be paid online i.e., net banking/credit card/debit card. No other mode of payment will be accepted.

placement_report.college_name: BITS Pilani Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: BITS Pilani Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: BITS Pilani has released the placement details for the Class of 2025. According to the media report, BITS Pilani has achieved 54.35% placements in the semestor 1 of the placement session 2025 across its three Indian campuses (Pilani, Goa, Hyderabad). A total of 1700 students registered for the placements, of which 924 secured job offers from reputed companies. The average salary offered across the three campuses stood at INR 28.64 LPA . The average package secured by the students of the BITS Pilani batch 2025 was INR 31.63 LPA. The top recruiters of BITS Pilani in 2025 include Accenture, EY, IBM, General Electric, Volvo Eicher, etc.

According to the official record, the highest and average packages offered to the MBA BA students during BITS Pilani placements 2025 was INR 26 LPA and INR 16.57 LPA. T he median package secured by the MBA batch 2025 was INR 18 LPA .
Earlier, BITS Pilani achieved a placement rate of 82.75% for First Degree (FD) and 73.61% placements for Higher Degree (HD) courses for 2023-2024.

The table below showcases the BITS Pilani average package offered to MBA BA students between 2024 and 2025: Course Average Package (2024) Average Package (2025) MBA BA INR 17.45 LPA INR 16.57 LPA The overall BITS Pilani average package offered between 2023 and 2025 are tabulated below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Placement Statistics (2024) Placement Statistics (2025) Average package (overall) INR 20.79 LPA INR 19.70 LPA INR 31.63 LPA

faqs.question: How many recruiters participated during the recent BITS Pilani placements?
faqs.answer: As per the media reports, BITS Pilani attracted 297 recruiters for its 2025 placement session who offered a variety of job roles to the students across sectors, such as BFSI, IT, Education, FMCG, Consulting, and E-Commerce, etc. The list of recruiters included KPMG, Accenture, Barclays, IBM, EY, Yes Bank, etc. The total number of recruiters participated during BITS Pilani placements between 2023 and 2025 are tabulated below: Particulars Statistics (2023) Statistics (2024) Statistics (2025) Total Companies 314 350 297

faqs.question: Why is the BTech fee so high at BITS Pilani?
faqs.answer: BITS Pilani is a private university in India and its fee is higher for following reasons: BITS Pilani has world-class infrastructure with high-tech labs, libraries, sports facilities, and accommodation facilities. BITS Pilani faculty is highly qualified and experienced faculty from across the world, and hiring them is costly. The university invests heavily in research facilities and equipment, which requires a significant amount of funding. The institute has a strong reputation for its graduates who are highly sought after by top companies in India and abroad.

faqs.question: What is the BITSAT application fee?
faqs.answer: While filling out the BITSAT application form, the candidates will have to pay the required fee. For a single session, the BITSAT application fee is INR 3,400 (male candidates) and INR 2,900 (female candidates). However, if the candidates wish to attempt both sessions, then they will have to pay INR 5,400 (male candidates) and INR 4,400 (female candidates). The application fee can be paid online i.e., net banking/credit card/debit card. No other mode of payment will be accepted.

highlights.description:
One of India’s top institutes is BITS Pilani. As per the NIRF Ranking 2025, the rank of the institute is #16 under the category Overall, #7 under University, #11 under Engineering, #2 under Pharmacy, and #18 under Research Institutions. At the international level, QS World Rankings 2025 has ranked the institute at #801-850 position. BITS Pilani is top ranked by multiple national & international ranking bodies for its academic offerings and renowned faculty. Its faculty has a proven track record of doing great research. nirf.description:
Over the years, BITS Pilani has earned commendable rankings across different domains in the NIRF 2024. This signifies the institution's esteemed reputation and proficiency in various aspects, assigning it an overall good score. It can be seen that the BITS Pilani's rankings in 'Overall' category have displayed an increasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2024, BITS Pilani climbed 2 ranks to #23 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The rankings of the institute in the 'University' category have demonstrated a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2024, BITS Pilani climbed 1 rank to #19 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Rankings achieved by the institute under the 'Engineering' category have exibited an increasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2024, BITS Pilani climbed 5 ranks to #20 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It has been seen that in the 'Pharmacy' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2024, BITS Pilani's rank is #3, the same as last year's rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
Refer to the rankings and categories from various ranking bodies in the table below.
