admission_process.title: Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Research Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Research admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Researchoffers courses at UG, PG and Advanced Masters levels. Some of the courses include BPT, MBBS, MD and M.Sc. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 30,000 - 50,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 66 months - 3 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years - 3 years.

description: IPGMER Kolkata cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Research NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 18783 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Research MBBS cutoff 2025 was 18783 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 8662 for admission to the MBBS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Research accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Research NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 13739 to 77262. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Research MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Respiratory Medicine, followed by MD in Pharmacology. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 13739 and 77262, respectively.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Research NEET SS Cutoff 2024 was released for the concluding round in the form of ranks for admission to DM, M.Ch. courses across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for various categories belonging to the AI quota.

While for the last round, the closing ranks ranged from 10 to 4490, wherein DM in Pulmonary Medicine proved to be the most sought-after in the General AI category. Students can check the first and last round closin

reviews.review_heading: Perfusion technology in IPGME&R and SSKMH - A beautiful journey .
reviews.review_text: We have a well-equipped lecture theatre with projectors, computers, AC, green boards, speakers, and microphones. There is also a dissection hall and other practical rooms where you can gain experience in your practical work. You also get to work in a real cardiac ICU and OT. You get great exposure. There are four canteens and many other fast-food stores on campus. We have fields where you can play cricket, soccer, or badminton. A gym is also available. There is a central library, and we also hav...

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
Library: for access of medical students, free, adjacent student study room. Classrooms: air conditioning, use of projectors, etc.
Wi-Fi facilities are available on campus and in the library. Hostel rooms are decent, Wi-Fi, gym facilities, etc.
Food quality is really good and there is more than one canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no placement system like engineering colleges.
reviews.review_text: There is not any hostel provided to Diploma students. If you are doing B.Sc.  course, then you will get hostels. Besides we can use other facilities like canteen, play ground, library etc. There is free Wi-Fi available in our departments. Food in canteen is pretty good. One can play outdoor games as well with indoors.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in India.
reviews.review_text: We have two carrom boards and two table tennis boards. It also provides a small playground. Hostel facilities are good, and elevator is also available. Hostel provides facilities like a fire control system, cameras,  24X7 water supply, and a canteen. There is a good security guard as well. The washrooms are clean.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely right college for Medical. Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are top medical faculty members at the Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Research. You can connect to free Wi-Fi. Each and every department has its own laboratory. There is central library. There is good food and a mess available.

reviews.review_heading: IPGME&R is a professional career building platform.
reviews.review_text: The college is government-aided, so all the facilities and infrastructure required for the MBBS course are offered almost for free. Wi-Fi and well-oriented and good classrooms are available for students. Laboratories are available for each department. A large and accessible central library is present in my college. Our college authority provides us with well-oriented, neat and clean hostel for students who reside far from the campus. Our hostel is very nice, comfortable and accessible for studen...

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the college. We have a good location, campus and food.
reviews.review_text: Our college has air-conditioners, a library, and classrooms. We have good food at the canteen, Rs. 45 per meal. Our class timings are from 9 am to 4 pm, and the library timings are from 10 am to 12 am. There is no Wi-Fi in the classroom and library. There are 2 boys per room and 3 to 4 girls per room in our hostel. There are 4 bathrooms for every 20 students.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in India.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good, may be within the top 10 among all medical colleges in India. Hostel facilities are also good including free Wi-Fi, library, classrooms, etc. The food in our canteen is good, not excellent but value for money.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. The laboratories are rich and well decorated. The classrooms are good to take classes with modern equipments, so it is very comfortable for a student to attend classes with projector mode, having a structure to take online classes. It also has many libraries, and our undergraduate library is very much comfortable for students and also rich in many books.

reviews.review_heading: It is the medical college of India producing excellent doctors.
reviews.review_text: This college is clean, and the laboratories are provided. The classrooms are clean and have an air-conditioner. Libraries and gyms are also provided in this college. The hostel has Wi-Fi of 2 Mbps of speed. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are also available. The sports and games are played in the playground.

reviews.review_heading: It is a wonderful institute.
reviews.review_text: There are air-conditioned lecture theatres and a library. The campus also has a free Wi-Fi connection. There is also a large college ground for sports, and gyms are also available for students. There are canteens in all hostel buildings which provide good food at reasonable prices.

reviews.review_heading: I am very much satisfied because of the faculty, facilities, and less expenditure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are available. Labs are pretty well-equipped to carry out experiments. Lecture halls, which have a capacity of more than 200 students, with air-conditioners, projector, and whiteboards. Library has a good collection of books. Hostel is also good. Boys and girls have different hostels in MBBS. The quality of food available in canteens is also good. Sports facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: IPGME&R has high facilities and is a great place to get medical education and treatment.
reviews.review_text: Our college has many modern facilities. Labs have modern instruments which serve a huge range of activities such as tests and experiments in order to conduct research. Tests like X-rays, MRI and CT scans are done with highly advanced instruments. Our college is now declared as the centre of excellence. Classes are held in lecture theatres which are fully air-conditioned and have sufficient capacity. Lecture theatres have projectors to conduct E-classes, and speakers are also available. There is ...

reviews.review_heading: IPGMER is a premier medical institute in India.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a huge number of well maintained, mordernised and clean lecture theatres with abundant and proper seating capacity. The rooms are air-conditioned and equipped with projectors and a speaker system. In UCM building and the academic building, most of the theory classes are conducted. They are properly well maintained and have security on the ground floor. There is even a book store at the bottom of the UCM building. There are around 6-7 canteens on the campus, and all of them offer ...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college, students can take admission.
reviews.review_text: Our college has all facilities for the students. It has Wi-Fi enabled campus. It also has an e-library, teleconsultation room, morgue, etc. The hostel is built with floor tiles and with good qualities supplies fitted. We have many canteens, and if students do not like food then they can choose another food.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: KIMS- Huge infrastructure that offers a good amount of stipend during internships.

content.Placements: KIMS a part of KIIT offers valuable education both clinically and theoretically to ace medical students. It offers courses such as MBBS, pharma, nursing, allied and paramedical sciences, as well as MD and super speciality courses and recruit admission on the basis of NEET-UG, PG, and SS exams.
content.Infrastructure: On our KIMS campus food courts are available to hang out. Wi-Fi is available in hostels. Mess food is good both vegetarian and non-vegetarian foods available, fully air-conditioned rooms with double occupancy, huge football ground and sports room and gym swimming pool facility are also available for medical students. Library of KIMS is very nice and has a very good ambiance which allows medical students to study in silence. Above 2000 bed capacity is available in KIMS has super-specialty and oncology hospital. Each department has OPD, ward, OT, and ICUS. KIMS has a huge infrastructure with experienced doctors and they are helping medical students to become good future doctors.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: KIMS has set a benchmark!

content.Placements: College provides excellent opportunities for exposure, especially with practical experience, creating a safe atmosphere for budding doctors. The students are given the opportunity for internships under the best doctors and fraternity, along with valuable public dealing experiences.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides great amenities, from sports complexes to high-tech libraries. The college has a four-story library with computer labs and information resources. There are also sports complexes with training for all major sports and swimming pools with trained instructors.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The course is tough, as are the faculty, but the patient inflow and the devices are worth it.

content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good, and all the facilities, including free Wi-Fi, are present. The classroom or lecture hall is rather large and spacious to accommodate the 250 students. Medical students have their personal library, and one common library is also present.

content.Placements: There are almost 250 students in each class every year. After completion of your 4-year MBBS course, you will do an internship and can appear for PG exams. Package depends on your work experience. The more participants you interact with, the more your experience and learnings will be.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and campus life are great here; free Wi-Fi is available throughout the college and hostel. Labs are available for all the subjects taught and lots of libraries, including a big central library, are available for students to study in. The quality of food available in the mess is decent enough. Gyms and food courts are available throughout the campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college life but not value for money.

content.Placements: There is an internal internship programme. There are 4.5 years of teaching and a 1.5-year internship. The payment for my senior batch was 35k per month, which keeps increasing per batch. Everyone gets the internship. After that, the students can look for jobs outside, opt for a juniorship in KIMS or prepare for a PG.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good and is improving day by day. The college has 24/7 library faculty. Good lecture theater. The hostels are pretty good too but not as great as it seems. The infrastructure currently is 2 or 3 out of 5. But with the renovations that are going on, it is surely gearing up.

courses_data.description: At the PG level,KIMS - Kalinga Institute of Medical Sciencesoffers MD in full time mode. The programme is offered for a duration of 3 years. The programme is offered in specialisations such as Pharmacology, Microbiology and Pathology. hostel_campus.college_name: Kalinga Institute of Medical Sciences Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: There are 20 hostels for boys and 11 hostels for girls are available with accommodation capacity of 10180 and 5648 students respectively. About 30% of the hostel rooms are air-conditioned and all the hostels have attached canteens serving good quality food. Each hostel has 24-hour reading room, the facility for indoor and outdoor games and wireless internet and intranet connectivity. There is a dedicated international hostel accommodates foreign students.

library.description: The Library of Kalinga Institute of Medical Sciences is very well-stocked with 32491 books, National and International both Print Journals having count of 67 titles, Back Volumes are 135 titles, CDs and DVD's are 400 in number.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Hockey Ground, Volleyball Court, Throwball Court, Rugby Ground, Track & Field (400 m)

library.description: The Library of Kalinga Institute of Medical Sciences is very well-stocked with 32491 books, National and International both Print Journals having count of 67 titles, Back Volumes are 135 titles, CDs and DVD's are 400 in number.

cafeteria.description: There are two cafeterias, one for students and one for staffs inside the campus serves soft & hot drinks, snacks & Ice-creams. The cafeteria offers appetizing fare ranging from snacks to full-fledged meals spanning South Indian, North Indian, and Chinese cuisine.

hostel.description: There are 20 hostels for boys and 11 hostels for girls are available with accommodation capacity of 10180 and 5648 students respectively. About 30% of the hostel rooms are air-conditioned and all the hostels have attached canteens serving good quality food. Each hostel has 24-hour reading room, the facility for indoor and outdoor games and wireless internet and intranet connectivity. There is a dedicated international hostel accommodates foreign students.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Hockey Ground, Volleyball Court, Throwball Court, Rugby Ground, Track & Field (400 m)

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Language Lab, Medical Lab, Skill Lab

other_facilities: KIMS Hospital and Pradyumna Bal Memorial Hospital

reviews.review_heading: KIMS- Huge infrastructure that offers a good amount of stipend during internships.
reviews.review_text: On our KIMS campus food courts are available to hang out. Wi-Fi is available in hostels. Mess food is good both vegetarian and non-vegetarian foods available, fully air-conditioned rooms with double occupancy, huge football ground and sports room and gym swimming pool facility are also available for medical students. Library of KIMS is very nice and has a very good ambiance which allows medical students to study in silence. Above 2000 bed capacity is available in KIMS has super-specialty and onc...

reviews.review_heading: KIMS has set a benchmark!
reviews.review_text: The college provides great amenities, from sports complexes to high-tech libraries. The college has a four-story library with computer labs and information resources. There are also sports complexes with training for all major sports and swimming pools with trained instructors.

reviews.review_heading: The course is tough, as are the faculty, but the patient inflow and the devices are worth it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good, and all the facilities, including free Wi-Fi, are present. The classroom or lecture hall is rather large and spacious to accommodate the 250 students. Medical students have their personal library, and one common library is also present.

reviews.review_heading: Life of a medical student at KIMS.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and campus life are great here; free Wi-Fi is available throughout the college and hostel. Labs are available for all the subjects taught and lots of libraries, including a big central library, are available for students to study in. The quality of food available in the mess is decent enough. Gyms and food courts are available throughout the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good college life but not value for money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good and is improving day by day. The college has 24/7 library faculty. Good lecture theater. The hostels are pretty good too but not as great as it seems. The infrastructure currently is 2 or 3 out of 5. But with the renovations that are going on, it is surely gearing up.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with everything that I got in this college and course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. There is nothing so compromising that has been done with infrastructure, facilities, etc. Every department in KIMS is well-equipped, well-stabilized, and fully air-conditioned. At our hospital known as PBMH, i.e., Pradyumna Bal Memorial Hospital, the quality of food is very good compared to any other college hostel. It is more suitable and adjustable for non-vegetarian food lovers. A canteen is available everywhere inside the campus with the name F...

reviews.review_heading: College with a fairy wings.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. Each department has its own labs where practical classes are being conducted. The classrooms are smart classes with well-equipped projectors and screens. The library is fully functional with all the main textbooks and reference books. It also contains the latest journals, articles and review books. The quality of food at the mess is just eatable. The campus has many canteens which offer good foods.

reviews.review_heading: The medical college that made my dream true.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The college also has an attached teaching hospital with a bed capacity of around 2300. The hospital is a multispeciality hospital with all the modern equipment and facilities such as ICU, NICU, PICU, ECMO, etc. The whole campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. All the classrooms are equipped with projectors and LCD screens to assist teaching and learning. The library contains all the books required during medical learning with updated articles and journals too. ...

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best medical colleges in the country.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. All the hostel rooms are equipped with Wi-Fi. Each department has its own labs, and lecture halls are equipped with projectors and LCD screens. The library of our college has every textbook and reference book. It also consists of medical journals, articles and research papers. The mess food is alright and serves both north Indian and south Indian food. Many canteens serve good quality foods. The college also provides many opportunities in sports a...

reviews.review_heading: It is the best medical college in Eastern India providing world-class medical education.
reviews.review_text: The college has a world-class infrastructure and facilities. The college has an attached 2300 bedded hospital with a good influx of patients which makes it one of its kind in the state of Odisha. All the hospital has an ECMO facility which no other medical college in Odisha has. The classrooms are smart classes with a projector facility. The college also has a 3 floored library with all the essential books and medical journals. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled 24X7. The food served in the mess is lik...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is a place to live your dreams.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college includes a 2,300 bedded multispeciality hospital, a teaching college building, labs, dissection hall, gyms, swimming pools, boys and girls hostels, several canteens, etc. Each department has a separate wing in the hospital. All the hostels and hospital are fully Wi-Fi enabled. There are 5 lecture halls with LCD screens and projectors. The library has a reading club, and one can also get books for reading at the hostel for a period of 15 days which is renewable. ...

reviews.review_heading: KIMS college will give wings to your dreams.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is remarkably good with good amenities, and the college authority is working tirelessly to improve it. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are smart classes with LCD screens and projectors to make students learn better. The library is one of its kind with a reading facility and contains all the newly published articles and journals. The mess food can be improved in the quality and taste.

reviews.review_heading: I am lucky to be a part of KIMS, pursuing my dream course from here.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are good enough. The infrastructure of our college is quite good. The hospital consists of 2,300 beds, which is going to increase in the near future. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The classrooms are smart classes, and the library has all the medical books related to the curriculum. The hostel rooms are 2-bedded AC rooms with attached bathrooms. The mess food, according to me, is just fine and eatable. But you can have good food in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: In our college, you can achieve your dreams.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is gigantic. The college building is spread in a large area, and the attached hospital has a bed capacity of around 2,300, which is large. The campus is fully Wi-Fi-enabled, and classrooms are smart with projectors and LCD screens. The library contains a varied number of medical books, articles and research papers. There is a ground for organising sports events like cricket, basketball, volleyball, etc. The mess food is average.

reviews.review_heading: KIMS is a brand in medical education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is fabulous. It has several towering buildings and a large multispeciality-attached teaching hospital where clinical postings of students occur. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and the classrooms are air-conditioned and equipped with modern amenities. The hostel provides double-sharing rooms with attached washrooms. The mess provides good and healthy food. Medical facilities are very good and serve all the needs of students.

college_info.intro:
Bhimrao University Lucknow offers a diverse range of programmes to students. The university offers BTech and MBA programmes to students as its flagship courses. These courses are offered for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively. BBAU Lucknow courses are offered in full-time mode and across several specialisations.
Some of the popular specialisations offered under BTech and MBA programmes are Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication, Financial, Marketing Management, Human Resource Management, and more. Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University Lucknow courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. faqs.answer: A:    No other entrance exam score apart from CUET-PG is accepted for admission in MA at BBAU. Candidates willing to be admitted to the MA programme at Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University (BBAU) must take the CUET-PG exam to get admission in MA at BBAU.Applicants, based on their CUET-PG score, will be selected for the counselling process, and after the completion of the counselling process, candidates will have to get their documents verified and pay the tuition fees in order to get their MA seat confirmed.

reviews_list.review_title: Best university for M.Sc. in physics course.

review_content.Placements: Currently, the placements happening for us. In my senior batch, 90% of them were placed. Many companies come in looking for jobs, but most companies come in looking for employment and financial information. We had a great choice of dual specialisation, which made it easier for us to clarify what to do for the best placements. The roles offered were aeronautical engineer, laboratory technician, etc. Internships were offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel was nice and completely furnished with Wi-Fi and beds. The cuisine at the hostel was superb. The infrastructure of our lab was excellent. Our classrooms were tidy. Our college had digital classrooms. Hospital and eateries were beneficial. Our college promoted student participation in sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is a nice place with 24/7 library access.

review_content.Placements: There are 100 students in my course. The highest package is 5 lacs, and the lowest is 3 lacs. Others included several NGOs, schools, and coaching centers. The teaching role involved an internship in a government school. All students completed their internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The department had a library and a smart classroom, which was helpful for micro-teaching and simulated teaching. Most girls stayed in the hostel, while about 70% of the boys had to stay outside the campus. The food in the hostel was good.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Life Sciences - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Professors are very helpful in nature. It is a good university.

review_content.Placements: The batch is very good, there are 32 students in my class. The college faculty members do not allow us to do internships. In the last semester, there was a training program held by the university. The training programme is held by ICAR in Nainital. But they take money for this, and we go on to study tour in Uttarakhand.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a very poor Wi-Fi connection, and the library is good. Classrooms do not have AC. In the hostel, the mess food is a disaster. The canteen is also not so good. Medical facilities are very fast but not so good. Sports and games are also available in this college. The central library is very good with full AC.

review_summary.college_name: Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Affordable education with good infrastructure and below-average placement support.

content.Placements: I belonged to the B.Com (Hons) batch at Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Lucknow. Placement opportunities are average. The highest package offered is around 4 LPA-5 LPA, the lowest package is about 1.8 LPA-2 LPA, and the average package stood at approximately 2.5 LPA-3 LPA. Some of the top recruiting companies that visited the campus included TCS, Infosys (support roles), HDFC Bank, etc. About 40-50 percent of students managed to get internships mostly in banks. Many students also secured internships on their own through online platforms. The top roles offered are Accounts Executive, Junior Accountant, etc.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: College was pretty fine, value for money, but average compared to good media colleges.

content.Placements: Hardly 10% of students got placed. The highest package was 3.6 LPA, and the lowest was 2.2 LPA. Only 5 out of 50 students got placement, that too on the professor's personal favors and relations. So, you have to prepare and place yourself by searching for a decent job on your own, otherwise, it is tough here.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and labs were available, but we rarely had lab visits. The hostels were nice with average food. There were many hostels, only students from outside Uttar Pradesh got a hostel here, so be prepared for hostel and mess expenses if you are from Uttar Pradesh itself.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best university for M.Sc. in physics course.

content.Placements: Currently, the placements happening for us. In my senior batch, 90% of them were placed. Many companies come in looking for jobs, but most companies come in looking for employment and financial information. We had a great choice of dual specialisation, which made it easier for us to clarify what to do for the best placements. The roles offered were aeronautical engineer, laboratory technician, etc. Internships were offered.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel was nice and completely furnished with Wi-Fi and beds. The cuisine at the hostel was superb. The infrastructure of our lab was excellent. Our classrooms were tidy. Our college had digital classrooms. Hospital and eateries were beneficial. Our college promoted student participation in sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a nice place with 24/7 library access.

content.Placements: There are 100 students in my course. The highest package is 5 lacs, and the lowest is 3 lacs. Others included several NGOs, schools, and coaching centers. The teaching role involved an internship in a government school. All students completed their internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The department had a library and a smart classroom, which was helpful for micro-teaching and simulated teaching. Most girls stayed in the hostel, while about 70% of the boys had to stay outside the campus. The food in the hostel was good.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Life Sciences - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Professors are very helpful in nature. It is a good university.

content.Placements: The batch is very good, there are 32 students in my class. The college faculty members do not allow us to do internships. In the last semester, there was a training program held by the university. The training programme is held by ICAR in Nainital. But they take money for this, and we go on to study tour in Uttarakhand.
content.Infrastructure: There is a very poor Wi-Fi connection, and the library is good. Classrooms do not have AC. In the hostel, the mess food is a disaster. The canteen is also not so good. Medical facilities are very fast but not so good. Sports and games are also available in this college. The central library is very good with full AC.

The admission process at BBAU Lucknow is strictly based onCUET scores.The admission process for UG and PG courses at Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University is done through CUET-UG and CUET-PG exams. To know the complete procedure students can download the PDF below:
BBAU Lucknow CUET UG Counselling Process 2026

After the declaration of CUET result, students can apply for admission to their desired courses at BBAU or Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University. Candidates who selected BBAU Lucknow during theCUET application formfilling and appeared for the exam are eligible for admission to the UG courses. A course-wisemerit listis released for the UG courses on the official website of the university.

CUET UG score is accepted for BTech, BSc, BCom, BVoc, BBA and other UG courses offered in main campus andAmethi campus. Shortlisted candidates who meet the course-specific eligibility criteria are further called for BBAU Lucknowcounselling process.

faqs.answer: In order to get admission at BBAU, aspirants need to meet the last educational qualification. The selection criteria for every course is through CUET. The selection criteria for various courses at the university, the students need to have a valid score of CUET-UG and CUET-PG. faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in BBAU?
faqs.answer: There is no other way around to get direct admission in any of the UG or PG courses at Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University (BBAU). The course admission is firmly based on the score of CUET conducted by the National Testing Agency (NTA).Students who want to pursue any particular course must take the CUET exam, and if the candidate is able to get a good rank that is above the closing rank mentioned in the cut-off list released by Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University (BBAU), then the student can register for the counselling round followed by document verification along with the fee payment.

faqs.question: What is the admission policy of BBAU?
faqs.answer: As per admission policy 2023,  50% seats of total intake are reserved for SC/ST applicant. A total of 10% for EWS and 5% for PWDs. However, reservation is applicable as per existing rules and norms by BBAU. According to the BBAU admission policy, seats under SC/ST category shall be interchangable if candidates under a given category is/are not available.

faqs.question: When will the CUET admit card release?
faqs.answer: NTA will release the CUET admit card 2026 online in second week of May at cuet.nta.nic.in. Candidates will be able to download their admit cards online at cuet.nta.nic.in. The admit card will be available for download in PDF document and is a mandatory document to be carried to the exam centre. Prior to the release of the CUET UG admit card, NTA will release the advance intimation of exam city slip. It is not the admit card, but will inform candidates about the city. After downloading the CUET UG 2026 admit card, candidates will have to check all the details carefully and ensure that there is no mistake. In case of any error, they will have to contact NTA to get the necessary corrections done.

placement_data.title: BBAU Lucknow Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The University has not released the 2025 placement report yet. However, the NIRF report 2025 is out on the official website. According to the report, 151 UG 3-year students, 36 PG 1-year and 1,302 PG 2-year students were placed during BBAU placements 2022. The median package offered to UG 3-year courses during Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University placements 2024 stood at INR 11.85 LPA. For PG 1-year and PG 2-year, the median package offered was INR 6.92 LPA and INR 9.52 LPA, respectively.

faqs.answer: The BBAU highest package details are yet to be released. However, the median package is released for a few courses. The university has a centralised placement cell that provides placement-related support to students. The placement centre at BBAU Lucknow also organises specialised lectures, workshops and job fairs. Many recruiters participate in the campus placement and offer the best packages to the students.

faqs: What is the cutoff mark for CUET PG in MSc at BBAU?
What is the cut off for CUET UG at Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University?
description: BBAU Lucknow cutoff 2025 for CUET UG has been released for admission to the various UG courses. Candidates can scroll down to check the course-wise cutoff. A few more updates for BBAU Lucknow cutoff are given below:

As per BBAU cutoff 2023, the Round 1 closing score for M.A. in Education is 96, for Master of Law (LL.M.) is 56, for M.A. in Sanskrit is 102, for M.A. in Yoga is 86 and for M.A. in English is 66 for the General category students belonging to All India Quota. Candidates aspiring for BBAU admission 2024 to PG courses, must have a valid score in CUET PG. BBAU offers admission to various PG courses including MA, MSc and MLib.Sc amongst others based on CUET PG scores followed by round-wise counsellin

As per BBAU cutoff 2023, the closing scores for top 5 PG courses stood at 96 for M.A. in Education, at 56 for Master of Law (LL.M.), at 102 for M.A. in Sanskrit, M.A. in Yoga is 86 and at 66 for M.A. in English. Of all the PG courses, M.A. in Sanskrit can be considered the most competitive of all because of the highest closing scores. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table given below to check out the BBAU CUET PG scores round-wise and category-wise:
Some of the important dates related to CUET PG are given below for BBAU Lucknow PG admission.

nirf.description:
BBAU Lucknow has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, BBAU Lucknow fell 11 ranks to #69 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. Throughout the preceding two years, the rank has oscillated but is currently stable.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, BBAU Lucknow fell 4 ranks to #37 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Management' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, BBAU Lucknow climbed 7 ranks to #79 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'Law' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, BBAU Lucknow fell 2 ranks to #12 rank in the 'Law' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Affordable education with good infrastructure and below-average placement support.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University is quite good and well spread across a large green campus. Classrooms for B.Com (Hons) are spacious and well-ventilated. The university has a central library with a good collection of commerce, management, and reference books along with reading halls. Wi-Fi facility is available on campus. Hostel facilities are decent with separate hostels for boys and girls. Rooms are clean and basic amenities like water and electricity are provided. T...

reviews.review_heading: College was pretty fine, value for money, but average compared to good media colleges.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and labs were available, but we rarely had lab visits. The hostels were nice with average food. There were many hostels, only students from outside Uttar Pradesh got a hostel here, so be prepared for hostel and mess expenses if you are from Uttar Pradesh itself.

reviews.review_heading: Best university for M.Sc. in physics course.
reviews.review_text: Hostel was nice and completely furnished with Wi-Fi and beds. The cuisine at the hostel was superb. The infrastructure of our lab was excellent. Our classrooms were tidy. Our college had digital classrooms. Hospital and eateries were beneficial. Our college promoted student participation in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: It is a nice place with 24/7 library access.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The department had a library and a smart classroom, which was helpful for micro-teaching and simulated teaching. Most girls stayed in the hostel, while about 70% of the boys had to stay outside the campus. The food in the hostel was good.

reviews.review_heading: Professors are very helpful in nature. It is a good university.
reviews.review_text: There is a very poor Wi-Fi connection, and the library is good. Classrooms do not have AC. In the hostel, the mess food is a disaster. The canteen is also not so good. Medical facilities are very fast but not so good. Sports and games are also available in this college. The central library is very good with full AC.

reviews.review_heading: Good lush green campus and well-equipped library.
reviews.review_text: We have fully ventilated and Wi-Fi enabled classroom, computer labs, and library with all the relevant books for study. As for the hostels, they are very good in condition. The food in canteen is average. We also have a medical facility available for us. We have playground with all types of sports and one sports center for indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great place for education. It has a good infrastructure, but there is a lack of placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus has a good infrastructure with pace and calmness. Every department has a Wi-Fi facility with good speed. All classrooms are also well-maintained and specially structured to prevent suffocation problems. It has good ventilation, a great library, etc.

reviews.review_heading: A college with attractive campus and helpful faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very excellent. Wi-Fi is also very good, and classrooms are fully AC. The library is also fully AC and Wi-Fi is available 24*7. Hostels are also very good, according to price. The mess and canteen food are far better than those at other colleges. There is a health centre in the university for students. Sports events are also organised at the university.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar Central University, Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are nice and clean, but the only demerit is that most people don't get a hostel as there is not a sufficient number of hostels. The rooms are okay, but not very good. Overall, the hostel facilities and mess are good, and you can expect a hostel if you are not close to the college.

reviews.review_heading: I hope for betterment soon.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are still lacking because this course is very new at the university. Hostels are pretty good, and the quality of food is also nice. There are many opportunities for a person if he or she is into sports. There are many clubs, and the library is one of the best in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with 80% placements in 2024. It has good staff members and professors.
reviews.review_text: We will get accommodation facility in form of hostels which is generally 2-3 seaters. Water, Wi-Fi, and electricity facilities are available for free. There is a fee of around Rs. 2,600 per semester for the hostel. Few hostels have a gym and common room with AC to study. Guest rooms for parents are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Some departments have good management but some do not. The college life is fun here.
reviews.review_text: Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University (BBAU) in Lucknow has areas that could be improved. The positive aspects are it is beautiful and green. Wi-Fi is available at departments and hostels. Some Classrooms are equipped with smart boards in some departments.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good but placement and college life are not that good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of hostel is good. Wi-Fi is available all the time. Mostly books are available in library of our branch which are easily issued by students. Classroom conditions are good. Hostel food is also good and all sub-services are available in hostels. Lab equipment are not available in labs. Infrastructure is also not that good, it is below average.

reviews.review_heading: Disappointed because of faculty and peer pressure of exams but satisfied with infrastructure 2025.
reviews.review_text: There is no such place which can be described as a lab. There is a dummy lab which contains a few computer systems, mainly used by professors, and most of them are faculty, so can't be used. The processors of computer systems can be compared with turtles. Hostels are fine enough to stay with the best facilities like geysers, water coolers, etc.

reviews.review_heading: A review about BBAU University from the Geology department.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi: All the departments and buildings of the campus are installed with free Wi-Fi networks that every student can access using their unique login code and password.
Labs: Labs are not well developed, generally lacking various major instruments and facilities that you may often find easily in other universities.
Classrooms: Classrooms are well furnished, but they are not air-conditioned. You may find it difficult during the summers as the temperature within the classrooms also reaches high.
Li...

The courses are available in the streams of Engineering, Management, Design, etc. Admission to Parul University courses is merit and entrance-based. As per the data curated from multiple sources, the top five courses of the university (in no particular order) are:Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA)Bachelor of Science (BSc)Master of Business Administration (MBA)Bachelor of Technology (BTech)Bachelor of Pharmacy (BPharm)
faqs.question: Q: Which is the best course offered in Parul University?

faqs.answer: Parul University offers a four-year BTech course in the stream of Engineering. This course is taught by the Faculty of Engineering & Technology more than 15 specialisations. Parul University also offers four Industry Embedded BTech courses, namely CSE/ IT with Microsoft, CSE/ IT with Quick Heal, CSE/ IT with SAP and CSE/ IT with Oracle. faqs.question: Q: Which BTech specialisation does Parul University offer?

faqs.answer: Parul University Online, Vadodara offers only one course in the stream of Management, i.e., MBA Online. This is a two-year-long online course. Students can pursue MBA Online in 20 Industry-centric specialisations. The institute has a collaboration with international universities located in France, UK and Japan. Students will study one year of this course in online mode at Parul University and a final year at an International University.
faqs.question: Q: What course does Parul University Online offer?

faqs.answer: Yes, Parul University offers an integrated BBA + MBA course in the stream of Management for a duration of four years. There is also an option to study a Diploma in Business Administration + Bachelor of Business Administration (DBA + BBA) course for a duration of five years. All of these courses are taught by the Faculty of Management Studies. In these courses, students get a combined UG & PG degree of BBA + MBA and Diploma + UG degree upon completion of the course. Candidates are required to pass Class 12 with English as the main subject from a recongised board for admission to the integrated course.

course_faqs.answer: Parul University offers BPharma for 4 years. Admission to this course is based on merit and entrance. Candidates must score a minimum of 50% aggregate in Class 12 and pass institution-level exams. The fee for BPharm may vary from INR 3.3 Lacs to INR 4.4 Lakh.

course_faqs.question: Is B.Pharm (lateral entry) course available at Parul University?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, Parul University offers a BPharm (lateral entry) course. It is a three-year course divided into six semesters. Candidates selected for admission are directly admitted to the second year of the course. Admission to the programme shall be granted on a merit basis. The eligible students can visit the university website to register and apply.

course_faqs.question: Which category has to pay more fees for BPharm courses at Parul University?
course_faqs.answer: The BPharm fees at Parul University is higher for the candidates who belong to the NRI category. Students of the NRI category have to pay INR 7.8 Lacs as BPharm fees. On the other hand, candidates who belong to the Management Quota are required to pay INR 5.4 Lacs for the BPharm course at Parul University. This difference in BPharm fees only applies to the first year admissions a Parul University. The BPharm fees for the lateral entry students is the same across all categories.

course_faqs.question: What is the BPharm fees for lateral entry students at Parul University?
course_faqs.answer: The Parul University BPharm fees for lateral entry student is the same for both Management Quota and NRI students. For NRI students, the BPharm lateral entry fees is INR 5.4 lakh. The fees is charged on per annum basis in three equal instalments. The fees is a combination of the tuition fees and university fees for Parul University BPharm lateral entry course.

overview_faqs.question: Is Parul University good for BHMS?
overview_faqs.answer: Parul University offers 5.5 years BHMS or Bachelor of Homoepathic Medicine and Surgery programme at the UG level. Students pursuing BHMS are open to ample placement opportunities. Parul University also provides placements to students. The overall the highest package offered to students is INR 60 LPA and average is INR 4-INR 6 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: Is Parul University in Vadodara, Gujarat good for BBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Parul University offers a good number of diversity in specialisations. Candidates can pursue a BBA course across 23 specialisations at Parul University. Those who get a degree of BBA from Parul University can build careers in Consultancy, Digital Marketing, Finance, Advertising, Banking, etc. The overall placement rate is also good at the university as per the statistics witnessed during the placement drive of the year 2022, where the highest package was INR 30 LPA and INR 7 LPA. Further, the department is equipped with advanced laboratories and classrooms that provide vital practical training exposure to students.

overview_faqs.question: Is studying at Parul University Goa free?
overview_faqs.answer: No, studying at Parul University, Goa is not free. Candidates must pay the course fee which ranges between INR 40K to INR 1.20 Lacs. The total fee can include multiple components, such as tuition fees, security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, and more. However, the university offers several scholarships with fee waivers. Eligible candidates can avail the benefits of the scholarship programs.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for Parul University BTech course?
overview_faqs.answer: Those who get selected via the admission process for BTech must proceed further to pay Parul University fee for BTech. The total fee for a four-year BTech course ranges between INR 5.15 Lacs – INR 8.07 lakh, which is inclusive of the Parul University BTech fee for all specialisations, BTech (Lateral Entry) and BTech (Industry Embedded) courses. Apart from this, candidates also have to pay an application fee of INR 300 at the time of filling the application form. For more course-specific fee details, students can visit the official website of Parul University.

review_summary.college_name: Parul University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best university India has to offer, both national and international.

content.Placements: Hence, I’m still a student, so I’m not eligible for the placement cell till now, but the students get posted to many companies, clinics, or hospitals with great opportunities and salary. What I know is that they are providing the best hospital exposure in the university itself.
content.Infrastructure: Good LED TV for PPT, projector, library, easy study material access, and many more things, with great university infrastructure and the best teaching staff. The most important thing is that we are allowed to learn many more things despite the course we have taken.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Knowledgeable faculty and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: There's a placement policy in my college which gives us training for free, and the top recruiting companies of my course are Indigo and Hitech Digital Solutions. Though there is a penalty if we don't follow the placement policy, it's fair enough to have it.
content.Infrastructure: I'm a day scholar, and the bus facilities are amazing. My friends live in a hostel, and I've heard about some hostel facilities that are good enough. The campus is very interesting and fun to be in. The bus timings align perfectly with our timetable.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Aviation, Hospitality, Travel and Tourism Management - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I absolutely loved it. I am satisfied with the infrastructure.

content.Placements: From my seniors' passing out batch for BBA Aviation, the placement season is good with approximately 80 percent of students securing offers before graduation. I am yet to know more about it. Overall, it is good with good packages, which I heard from my seniors who recently got placements. Students are even getting the opportunity to go abroad for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good, with every necessity provided for the students to use. It has secure Wi-Fi connections. There is a big library with books on so many courses. Hostels of Parul University are good and cozy for living. Free medical support is provided to students of this university in the Parul Hospital. The mess food is of all different kinds and varieties. The food tastes good. We have huge playgrounds and an arena for indoor sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Placement is not so good, but the infrastructure is good, and also the exposure it gives.

content.Placements: 50-60 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 23 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Recruiting companies areCognizant and Infosys for B.Tech and MBA. Many who got placed are the ones who were already placed somewhere or did an interview and had enough skills, so if you want to get an internship or a job, be ready to at least learn skills, as the company here selects a few.
content.Infrastructure: Good Wi-Fi and classrooms. The library is available. The quality of the medicine is available with free checkups. Wi-Fi is available everywhere in the hostel, library, or even food courts. The labs are also new, so nothing is needed. Canteen food is average, and they do provide fest and all.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Average college, not the best.

content.Placements: Good placement, 85% B.Tech CSE batch placed. The highest package is 27 LPA, the lowest: 2.5 LPA, average is 5.7 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Accenture, Wipro, Infosys, IBM, Amazon. Roles offered are Software Developer, Data Analyst, Cloud Engineer, Software Engineer, Full Stack Developer.
content.Infrastructure: CSE dept: Modern labs with high-speed Wi-Fi, projector classrooms, CSE library, AI/ML labs. Hostels are clean. The hostel has AC/Non-AC rooms, 24/7 Wi-Fi, gym, sports grounds, hospital, average mess food (Guj/North Indian), canteens, ATMs. Room conditions depend on what you pay.

faqs.question: What are the requirements at Parul University for BTech?
faqs.answer: Candidates must pass Class 12 Science with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subject with Chemistry/Computer Science/Information practice/Computer with 45% aggregate for general and 40% aggregate for reserved category in theory or theory and practical from recognised board to apply for BTech at Parul University.

faqs.question: How can I get into BTech at Parul University Vadodara?
faqs.answer: Parul University Vadodara offers admission to BTech course based on merit. Candidates are selected based on their qualifying exam scores. Aspirants who have completed Class 12 Science with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subject with Chemistry/Computer Science/Information practice/Computer with 45% aggregate for general and 40% aggregate for reserved category in theory or theory and practical from recognised board can get admission in the BTech programme.

faqs.question: What is the fee for Parul University BTech course?
faqs.answer: Those who get selected via the admission process for BTech must proceed further to pay Parul University fee for BTech. The total fee for a four-year BTech course ranges between INR 5.15 Lacs – INR 8.07 lakh, which is inclusive of the Parul University BTech fee for all specialisations, BTech (Lateral Entry) and BTech (Industry Embedded) courses. Apart from this, candidates also have to pay an application fee of INR 300 at the time of filling the application form. For more course-specific fee deta

faqs.question: Can I get admission to Parul University without JEE?
faqs.answer: Yes, aspirants can get direct admission to a four-year BTech course at Parul University without JEE score. It is not mandatory to qualify for JEE Main in order to get admission to BTech. The university also considers merit for BTech admission. Candidates who passed Class 12 with 45% aggregate in the stream of Science are eligible to apply for admission to BTech.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at Parul University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Parul University admission are open. Students who whish to get admission to the courses offered at Parul University can apply now. Parul University application form is available online at university website. Students who fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria can apply online.

faqs.question: How do I get a seat at Parul University?
faqs.answer: Parul University Vadodara offers seats to applicants based on their merit in the qualifying exam or entrance test. The selection for courses such as BDes, MDes, BArch, BPT, BAMS, etc. is entrance-based. For most of the courses, admission is offered based on qualifying exam scores of the aspirants. Selected candidates have to report at the campus for document verification. Aspirants need to pay the course fees to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BSc at Parul University Ahmedabad?
faqs.answer: Parul University Ahmedabad offers BSc for 3 years to 4 years in full-time mode on the basis of merit. Admission to the respective course is offered based on merit and requires candidates to secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12. The University offers respective course with several specialisations at a total tuition fees ranging from INR 1.8 Lacs to INR 3.6 Lakh.

faqs.question: Is admission to Parul University Ahmedabad merit-based or entrance-based?
faqs.answer: Parul University Ahmedabad offers admission to several UG courses such as BSc, BHMS, BPharma, and BPT based on Class 12 minimum aggregate of 50% in Class 12. However, for courses such as BHMS, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as NEET. Apart from this, for primary qualification of PG level programmes, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation.

placement_report.college_name: Parul University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Parul University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The highest package recorded during Parul University placement 2025 stood at INR 45 LPA . This package was offered to the student of the Faculty of Hotel Management & Catering Technology batch 2025 by Crowne Plaza. The participating recruiters offered more than 2500 job offers to the batch 2025 of courses like BTech , MBA , BPharma , BDes , and MCA , etc. The students secured over 900 Dream offers and more than 100 Super Dream offers from the participating recruiters. Some of the top recruiters of who visited the Parul University campus for 2025 placements include Amazon, IBM, TCS, Tech Mahindra, PwC, Wipro, Adani Group, Accenture, Godrej, H&M, Radission Blue, Crowne Plaza, etc.

Earlier, the highest and average package offered during Parul University placements 2024 stood at INR 46 LPA and INR 4.50 LPA, respectively. More than 1,300 recruiters visited the campus in 2024 and selected 2,212 students.
Download : Parul University Placements Brochure 2024-25

faqs.question: What are the best career options for the after MCA?
faqs.answer: As today is an age of computers, a candidate with an MCA degree will have great job opportunities in top level IT companies and consultancy firms. They will have opportunities in large corporations having an in-house systems department. An MCA graduate can work for any IT company big or small as a system developer and various other roles such as : * Software Programmer * Software Engineer * Software Developer * Systems Analyst * Software Application Architect * Software Consultant

faqs.question: Are MBA placements at Parul University any good?
faqs.answer: MBA is one of the most popular courses of Parul University. When it comes to the placements, the University offers decent placements annually. The highest and average package secured by the students of the MBA batch 2025 stood at INR 9 LPA and INR 5 LPA, respectively. More than 200 recruiters visited the campus for MBA placements 2025. The name of the few top recruiters include Accenture, Deloitte, Colgate, Airtel, Godrej, Aditya Birla Group, etc.

faqs.question: What are the salary packages offered during Parul University MBA placements?
faqs.answer: The highest and average package offered during Parul University placements 2025 stood at INR 9 LPA and INR 5 LPA, respectively. Some of the top recruiters of Parul University MBA placements 2025 include Accenture, Deloitte, Colgate, Airtel, Godrej, Aditya Birla Group, Berger Paints, Coca Cola, etc.

faqs.question: How much Parul University charges for the MBA in Financial Preparation and CFA Preparation?
faqs.answer: The MBA in Financial Preparation and CFA Preparation fees is INR 6 Lacs at Parul University. This fees is a combination of the tuition fees and university fees for the aforementioned MBA course. This MBA course has the highest fees of all MBA courses at Parul University. The fees for the MBA courses is charged in two instalments of INR 3 lakh. The tuition fee costs INR 4 Lacs while the university fees costs INR 2 Lacs for this particular MBA course at Parul University in 2026.

faqs.question: What is the MBA tuition fee at Parul University?
faqs.answer: Parul University MBA tuition fee is between INR 1.5 Lacs to INR 8.8 lakh. Stuents have to pay the tutition fee during the admission. Students must note that the mentioned fee detail is taken from the university website and is subject to changed.

nirf.description:
Parul University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Parul University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated an increasing trend in the 'Pharmacy' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Parul University climbed 6 ranks to #41 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It has been observed that the institute has shown stability in trend in the 'Innovation' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Parul University's rank is #11, the same as last year's rank in the 'Innovation' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the Parul University latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:

hostel.description: Parul University has established an in-house residential complex with separate provision for boys and girls with a capacity of accommodating the 7000+ student. The university has on-campus amenities such as gymnasium, swimming pool, open-air theatre, banking service and hospital are also available to the students. Separate hostel blocks for NRIs and International students equipped with air conditioner and other modern facilities are also available. There are Five Messes on campus which serve nutritious breakfast, lunch, high tea and dinner to the hostel residents.
facilities: Hostel: The university has on-campus amenities such as a swimming pool, gymnasium, open-air theatre, banking services, and others
Library: Parul University has various books on General Knowledge and competitive exams, dictionaries, and previous volumes of journals/ magazines
Cafeteria: All the hostels of the university have spacious dining halls.

library.description: Parul University has 10 libraries with more than 24000 books, 15825 online journals/magazines, 1315 print journals/magazines, 30 news dailies, reference section contains encyclopedias, books on general knowledge and competitive exams, dictionaries, previous volumes of journals/magazines and remote access to thousands of libraries through DELNET and also to various reference and plagiarism software. All libraries are linked to the central library “Gyanoday Bhawan” and are fully computerized with barcode system for issue and return of books. More than 20000 students avail book bank facility every year from these libraries at the campus.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volleyball Court, Hand Ball Court, Table Tennis

cafeteria.description: Parul University serves hygienic, homely and healthy food for all our students and scholars is the top most priority for the management of Parul University. All the hostels of the university have spacious dining halls and messes which serve breakfast, lunch and dinner as per the daily menu with special diet on Sundays. Moreover, there are food courts and college canteens where the students can go for tea, coffee, cold drinks, ice cream, snacks and different varieties of food throughout the day. The university also has Nescafe outlets on campus for students and staff.

reviews.review_heading: The best university India has to offer, both national and international.
reviews.review_text: Good LED TV for PPT, projector, library, easy study material access, and many more things, with great university infrastructure and the best teaching staff. The most important thing is that we are allowed to learn many more things despite the course we have taken.

reviews.review_heading: Knowledgeable faculty and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: I'm a day scholar, and the bus facilities are amazing. My friends live in a hostel, and I've heard about some hostel facilities that are good enough. The campus is very interesting and fun to be in. The bus timings align perfectly with our timetable.

reviews.review_heading: I absolutely loved it. I am satisfied with the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good, with every necessity provided for the students to use. It has secure Wi-Fi connections. There is a big library with books on so many courses. Hostels of Parul University are good and cozy for living. Free medical support is provided to students of this university in the Parul Hospital. The mess food is of all different kinds and varieties. The food tastes good. We have huge playgrounds and an arena for indoor sports.

reviews.review_heading: Placement is not so good, but the infrastructure is good, and also the exposure it gives.
reviews.review_text: Good Wi-Fi and classrooms. The library is available. The quality of the medicine is available with free checkups. Wi-Fi is available everywhere in the hostel, library, or even food courts. The labs are also new, so nothing is needed. Canteen food is average, and they do provide fest and all.

reviews.review_heading: Average college, not the best.
reviews.review_text: CSE dept: Modern labs with high-speed Wi-Fi, projector classrooms, CSE library, AI/ML labs. Hostels are clean. The hostel has AC/Non-AC rooms, 24/7 Wi-Fi, gym, sports grounds, hospital, average mess food (Guj/North Indian), canteens, ATMs. Room conditions depend on what you pay.

reviews.review_heading: Hostel is bad, placements are mid, campus is really good, hostel food is mid again.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are okay. There are fans but no ACs, so it gets noisy and hot, especially in summers. Overall infrastructure is really good. It has a library, study room, labs, and they are pretty good too. Mess food is mid. They have added digital boards and better video players, and it’s done.

reviews.review_heading: Positive student experience with some areas for improvement.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure for my course/department are excellent, including full-speed unlimited Wi-Fi, classrooms with smart boards, benches with plugs, a huge library, a separate lab building, and a MAC lab. Hostel facilities are good, and the food quality in the mess is also good. Medical facilities are available, as the university has its own hospital. Sports and games options are plentiful, including outdoor and indoor activities, horse riding, swimming, and a gymnasium.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Parul Institute of LawReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, best extracurricular activities, average study.
reviews.review_text: There are properly facilitated classrooms, Wi-Fi is available, and there is a big library, but it is not air-conditioned. Hostels are good, but the mess is not that good. However, the canteen and cafés are the best. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the university.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are in terrible condition. In the name of projector screens, the wall has been covered with a thick layer of lime, and benches are pretty old too. The hostel is in poor condition, and lights are not working properly. The cleaning staff members are not maintaining cleanliness. The issue of food is also very disturbing for students, as the taste is very bad. Medical facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: Parul University is best for events and campus life, but strict rules which I don't like.
reviews.review_text: Basically, I like the infrastructure. I am a BBA aviation student, so in my department, there's an aviation infrastructure plan class and aviation dummies. The courses are good, my department is well-furnished, and work is going on. It's under construction. More departments are also good for this, like the design department and the B.Tech building. It is a good campus, and the facilities are also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Okay, the college is really nice.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are the best and are in a neat and clean environment. The atmosphere of the college is too good. I don’t know about the mess, but in canteens and all stalls, there is good food. Sports are also a part of our study, and the facilities are also good, and the library is also very comfy.

reviews.review_heading: Parul is a decent private university in 2026.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good, I would say. The labs are well-equipped, and the classrooms have good long benches with smart boards in every class. There are many libraries on the campus. I personally used the one in the admin block. You will find various books related to your subjects there, along with desktops in the library to be used for academic purposes.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest students take admission in this college in any other courses.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the course is average. The infrastructure in the hostel is not good because we don't get enough hot water. The food quality is also not good. The mess staff members and reactors also sometimes do not behave properly. It looks like we are surviving for our lives, and the other facilities of the hostel are average.

reviews.review_heading: I like the college for its events and the quality of studies.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are basic, which helps us prepare a foundation, but to grow. We need to seek help from other universities, like government colleges, especially during our major projects. Facilities like a hostel, I don’t have an idea, as I am a day scholar, but sports and games are excellent here. I enjoy indoor sports in my free time, and the canteen is also good on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and social life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is awesome, and the facilities that we have are very good. Wi-Fi is so good, and classrooms are good and hygienic. The library is so great, and the reading area is too spacious, and we see the hostel facilities are awesome.

paragraphs: Parul University offers multiple scholarships and financial aid to its meritorious students. There is upto a 100% fee waiver offered to students. To avail the scholarships, candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria as per the scholarship category. Parul University Vadodara scholarship schemes mainly run into the following categories:
The university provides this scholarships to students who have participated and won awards at different levels. Below is the criteria:
First 3 PositionsOlympic Games/Paralympic Games
First 3 PositionsWorld Cups/Championships (4– year cycle), Asian Games/Para Asian Games (4–year cycle), Commonwealth Games/ Commonwealth Games (Para Athletes) (4–year cycle)
First 3 PositionsAsian Cups/Asian Championships (4–year cycle), World University Games (Every Two Years)
First 3 PositionsCommonwealth Championships (4–year cycle), World University Championship

First 3 PositionsAsian Championships (2–year cycle), Asian Championships (held annually), Commonwealth Championships (2–year cycle), Commonwealth Championships (held annually), World Cup/ World Championship conducted by IPC (2 Years cycle) or annually

Participation in Asian Championships (2–year cycle), Asian Championships (held annually), Commonwealth Championships (2– year cycle), Commonwealth Championships (held annually), World Cup/ World Championship conducted by IPC (2 Years cycle) or annually
Maka GamesMedal in Khelo India University Games, All India Inter–University, Senior National, Khelo India Youth Games (First 3 Positions)

Junior National, SGFI, State (First 3 Positions)
